The interdisciplinary efforts in fair classification, with machine learning research having the largest presence, have resulted in a large number of fairness notions and a wide range of approaches that have not been systematically evaluated and compared. In this paper, we contribute a broad analysis of 13 fair classification approaches and additional variants, over their correctness, fairness, efficiency, scalability, robustness to data errors, sensitivity to underlying ML model, data efficiency, and stability using a variety of metrics and real-world datasets. Our analysis highlights novel insights on the impact of different metrics and high-level approach characteristics on different aspects of performance. We also discuss general principles for choosing approaches suitable for different practical settings, and identify areas where data-management-centric solutions are likely to have the most impact.
items.abstract_zh: 分类是一项经过深入研究的数据驱动机器学习任务，它推动了越来越多涉及关键人类决策（例如贷款审批和犯罪风险评估）的预测系统。然而，分类器经常表现出歧视性行为，尤其是在提供有偏见的数据时。因此，分类的公平性已成为一个高度优先的研究领域。数据管理研究表明，人们对与数据和算法公平性相关的主题（包括公平分类主题）越来越感兴趣。公平分类方面的跨学科努力，其中机器学习研究占据最大份额，导致了大量的公平概念和广泛的方法尚未得到系统的评估和比较。在本文中，我们使用各种指标和真实数据集，对 13 种公平分类方法和其他变体进行了广泛分析，分析了它们的正确性、公平性、效率、可扩展性、对数据错误的鲁棒性、对底层 ML 模型的敏感性、数据效率和稳定性。我们的分析强调了关于不同指标和高级方法特征对绩效不同方面的影响的新颖见解。我们还讨论了选择适合不同实际环境的方法的一般原则，并确定以数据管理为中心的解决方案可能产生最大影响的领域。

items.title: P4DB - The Case for In-Network OLTP.
items.abstract: In this paper we present a new approach for distributed DBMSs called P4DB, that uses a programmable switch to accelerate OLTP workloads. The main idea of P4DB is that it implements a transaction processing engine on top of a P4-programmable switch. The switch can thus act as an accelerator in the network, especially when it is used to store and process hot (contended) tuples on the switch. In our experiments, we show that P4DB hence provides significant benefits compared to traditional DBMS architectures and can achieve a speedup of up to 8x.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 P4DB 的分布式 DBMS 新方法，它使用可编程交换机来加速 OLTP 工作负载。 P4DB 的主要思想是它在 P4 可编程交换机之上实现事务处理引擎。因此，交换机可以充当网络中的加速器，特别是当它用于在交换机上存储和处理热（竞争）元组时。在我们的实验中，我们表明 P4DB 与传统 DBMS 架构相比具有显着的优势，并且可以实现高达 8 倍的加速。

items.title: Cost-efficiency and Performance Robustness in Serverless Data Exchange.
items.abstract: Enterprises increasingly store their sporadically used data on cheap, elastic cloud storage to save costs. Analytical workloads on that data often appear in infrequent bursts presenting a high disparity in input data sizes. Using conservatively over-provisioned compute resources for this class of workloads is not cost-efficient as a fixed amount of resources only matches steady demand. Elastic query processors with a serverless architecture resolve this issue by running workers in cloud functions [3][9][10]. These systems can start thousands of functions within seconds, enabling elasticity down to query pipeline granularity. Moreover, serverless query processors come at no cost for idle times.
items.abstract_zh: 企业越来越多地将偶尔使用的数据存储在廉价、弹性的云存储上，以节省成本。该数据的分析工作负载通常出现在不频繁的突发中，从而呈现出输入数据大小的巨大差异。为此类工作负载使用保守的超额配置计算资源并不经济高效，因为固定数量的资源只能满足稳定的需求。具有无服务器架构的弹性查询处理器通过在云函数中运行工作线程来解决此问题[3][9][10]。这些系统可以在几秒钟内启动数千个功能，从而实现查询管道粒度的弹性。此外，无服务器查询处理器在空闲时间上是免费的。

items.title: GRADES-NDA'22: 5th International Workshop on Graph Data management Experiences and Systems (GRADES) and Network Data Analytics (NDA).
items.abstract: GRADES-NDA is the premier workshop on graph data management and analytics that aims to bring together researchers from academia, industry, and government. GRADES-NDA'22 is a forum for discussing recent advances in (large-scale) graph data management and analytics systems, as well as propose and discuss novel methods and techniques towards addressing domain specific challenges or handling noise in real-world graphs. In 2022, GRADES-NDA is in its fifth edition.
items.abstract_zh: GRADES-NDA 是图形数据管理和分析领域的顶级研讨会，旨在汇集来自学术界、工业界和政府的研究人员。 GRADES-NDA'22 是一个讨论（大规模）图形数据管理和分析系统最新进展的论坛，并提出和讨论解决特定领域挑战或处理现实世界图形中噪声的新颖方法和技术。 2022 年，GRADES-NDA 推出第五版。

items.title: Finding Label and Model Errors in Perception Data With Learned Observation Assertions.
items.abstract:
ML is being deployed in complex, real-world scenarios where errors have impactful consequences. In these systems, thorough testing of the ML pipelines is critical. A key component in ML deployment pipelines is the curation of labeled training data. Common practice in the ML literature assumes that labels are the ground truth. However, in our experience in a large autonomous vehicle development center, we have found that vendors can often provide erroneous labels, which can lead to downstream safety risks in trained models.

To address these issues, we propose a new abstraction, learned observation assertions, and implement it in a system called Fixy. Fixy leverages existing organizational resources, such as existing (possibly noisy) labeled datasets or previously trained ML models, to learn a probabilistic model for finding errors in human- or model-generated labels. Given user-provided features and these existing resources, Fixy learns feature distributions that specify likely and unlikely values (e.g., that a speed of 30mph is likely but 300mph is unlikely). It then uses these feature distributions to score labels for potential errors. We show that Fixy can automatically rank potential errors in real datasets with up to 2x higher precision compared to recent work on model assertions and standard techniques such as uncertainty sampling. Furthermore, Fixy can uncover labeling errors in 70% of scenes in a popular autonomous vehicle dataset.
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习正在部署在复杂的现实场景中，在这些场景中，错误会产生严重后果。在这些系统中，对机器学习管道进行彻底测试至关重要。机器学习部署管道中的一个关键组成部分是标记训练数据的管理。机器学习文献中的常见做法假设标签是基本事实。然而，根据我们在大型自动驾驶汽车开发中心的经验，我们发现供应商经常会提供错误的标签，这可能会导致训练模型中的下游安全风险。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的抽象，学习观察断言，并在名为 Fixy 的系统中实现它。 Fixy 利用现有的组织资源，例如现有的（可能有噪声的）标记数据集或之前训练的 ML 模型，来学习用于查找人类或模型生成的标签中的错误的概率模型。给定用户提供的特征和这些现有资源，Fixi 会学习指定可能值和不太可能值的特征分布（例如，速度可能为 30 英里/小时，但不太可能达到 300 英里/小时）。然后，它使用这些特征分布对潜在错误的标签进行评分。我们证明，与模型断言和不确定性采样等标准技术的最新研究相比，Fixy 可以自动对真实数据集中的潜在错误进行排名，精度高达 2 倍。此外，Fixi 可以发现流行的自动驾驶车辆数据集中 70% 的场景中的标签错误。

items.title: Remus: Efficient Live Migration for Distributed Databases with Snapshot Isolation.
items.abstract: Shared-nothing, distributed databases scale transactional and analytical processing over a large data volume by spreading data across servers. However, static sharding of data across nodes makes such systems fail to timely adapt to changing workloads and struggle to obey the cloud pay-as-you-go model. Migrating shards between nodes online is a key technique to react to dynamic changes of workloads for cloud elasticity. Existing approaches introduce severely degraded performance and service interruption, resulting in SLA violation on the cloud; or they are tailor-made to deterministic databases. In this paper, we propose Remus, a new live migration approach for shared-nothing, distributed databases with snapshot isolation. Remus migrates shards between nodes with zero service interruption and minimal performance impact. This is achieved by an efficient unidirectional dual execution during migration. We implement Remus on a shared-nothing, distributed version of PolarDB-PG and evaluate it against state-of-the-art approaches using standard OLTP workloads TPC-C and YCSB, and hybrid workloads consisting of long-lived and short transactions. The results demonstrate Remus is the only effective approach to achieve the goal of zero transaction interruption, zero downtime and marginal performance impact, paving the way for applying the shared-nothing architecture to a cloud database which needs to provide elasticity while guaranteeing strict SLAs.
items.abstract_zh: 无共享的分布式数据库通过跨服务器传播数据来扩展大数据量的事务和分析处理。然而，跨节点的静态数据分片使得此类系统无法及时适应不断变化的工作负载，并且难以遵守云按需付费模式。在线在节点之间迁移分片是应对工作负载动态变化以实现云弹性的关键技术。现有方法会导致性能严重下降和服务中断，导致云上的 SLA 违规；或者它们是针对确定性数据库量身定制的。在本文中，我们提出了 Remus，这是一种新的实时迁移方法，适用于具有快照隔离功能的无共享分布式数据库。 Remus 在节点之间迁移分片，实现零服务中断和最小的性能影响。这是通过迁移过程中高效的单向双重执行来实现的。我们在无共享、分布式版本的 PolarDB-PG 上实施 Remus，并使用标准 OLTP 工作负载 TPC-C 和 YCSB 以及由长寿命和短事务组成的混合工作负载，根据最先进的方法对其进行评估。结果表明，Remus 是实现零事务中断、零停机和边际性能影响目标的唯一有效方法，为将无共享架构应用于需要提供弹性同时保证严格 SLA 的云数据库铺平了道路。

items.title: TASTI: Semantic Indexes for Machine Learning-based Queries over Unstructured Data.
items.abstract: Unstructured data (e.g., video or text) is now commonly queried by using computationally expensive deep neural networks or human labelers to produce structured information, e.g., object types and positions in video. To accelerate queries, many recent systems (e.g., BlazeIt, NoScope, Tahoma, SUPG, etc.) train a query-specific proxy model to approximate a large target labelers (i.e., these expensive neural networks or human labelers). These models return proxy scores that are then used in query processing algorithms. Unfortunately, proxy models usually have to be trained per query and require large amounts of annotations from the target labelers. In this work, we develop an index (trainable semantic index, TASTI) that simultaneously removes the need for per-query proxies and is more efficient to construct than prior indexes. TASTI accomplishes this by leveraging semantic similarity across records in a given dataset. Specifically, it produces embeddings for each record such that records with close embeddings have similar target labeler outputs. TASTI then generates high-quality proxy scores via embeddings without needing to train a per-query proxy. These scores can be used in existing proxy-based query processing algorithms (e.g., for aggregation, selection, etc.). We theoretically analyze TASTI and show that a low embedding training error guarantees downstream query accuracy for a natural class of queries. We evaluate TASTI on five video, text, and speech datasets, and three query types. We show that TASTI's indexes can be 10x less expensive to construct than generating annotations for current proxy-based methods, and accelerate queries by up to 24x.
items.abstract_zh: 现在，通常使用计算成本昂贵的深度神经网络或人工标记器来查询非结构化数据（例如视频或文本），以生成结构化信息，例如视频中的对象类型和位置。为了加速查询，许多最近的系统（例如，BlazeIt、NoScope、Tahoma、SUPG 等）训练特定于查询的代理模型来近似大型目标标记器（即这些昂贵的神经网络或人类标记器）。这些模型返回代理分数，然后将其用于查询处理算法。不幸的是，代理模型通常必须针对每个查询进行训练，并且需要来自目标标记器的大量注释。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种索引（可训练语义索引，TASTI），它同时消除了对每个查询代理的需求，并且比以前的索引构建起来更高效。 TASTI 通过利用给定数据集中记录之间的语义相似性来实现这一点。具体来说，它为每个记录生成嵌入，以便具有紧密嵌入的记录具有相似的目标标记器输出。然后，TASTI 通过嵌入生成高质量的代理分数，而无需训练每个查询代理。这些分数可用于现有的基于代理的查询处理算法（例如，用于聚合、选择等）。我们从理论上分析了 TASTI，并表明低嵌入训练误差可以保证自然类查询的下游查询准确性。我们在五个视频、文本和语音数据集以及三种查询类型上评估 TASTI。我们表明，TASTI 索引的构建成本比为当前基于代理的方法生成注释的成本低 10 倍，并将查询速度提高高达 24 倍。

items.title: Lineage Resource Manager.
items.abstract: Main memory columnar database systems such as HyPer [1], Hana [4], MemSQL [9] have rapidly grown in use for both OLTP and OLAP applications in enterprise software [5]. Lineage capture in such in-memory columnar database systems incurs memory and performance overhead[2]. Hence we want to control the lineage capture overhead in such systems. We propose a lineage resource manager that employs specific mechanisms to control the lineage capture overhead. For implementing the resource manager, we consider an in-memory columnar query execution engine that supports concurrent query execution, where operators have been instrumented to capture lineage. Controlling lineage capture overhead is more imminent in embedded analytical systems (database systems running alongside another process, not as a standalone process) like DuckDB [11] and MonetDBLite [10].
items.abstract_zh: HyPer [1]、Hana [4]、MemSQL [9] 等主存列式数据库系统在企业软件 [5] 中的 OLTP 和 OLAP 应用程序中的使用迅速增长。这种内存中列式数据库系统中的沿袭捕获会产生内存和性能开销[2]。因此，我们希望控制此类系统中的沿袭捕获开销。我们提出了一种沿袭资源管理器，它采用特定的机制来控制沿袭捕获开销。为了实现资源管理器，我们考虑使用支持并发查询执行的内存中列式查询执行引擎，其中操作符已被用来捕获沿袭。在 DuckDB [11] 和 MonetDBLite [10] 等嵌入式分析系统（与另一个进程一起运行的数据库系统，而不是作为独立进程）中，控制谱系捕获开销更为紧迫。

items.title: Serenade - Low-Latency Session-Based Recommendation in e-Commerce at Scale.
items.abstract:
Session-based recommendation predicts the next item with which a user will interact, given a sequence of her past interactions with other items. This machine learning problem targets a core scenario in e-commerce platforms, which aim to recommend interesting items to buy to users browsing the site. Session-based recommenders are difficult to scale due to their exponentially large input space of potential sessions. This impedes offline precomputation of the recommendations, and implies the necessity to maintain state during the online computation of next-item recommendations.

We propose VMIS-kNN, an adaptation of a state-of-the-art nearest neighbor approach to session-based recommendation, which leverages a prebuilt index to compute next-item recommendations with low latency in scenarios with hundreds of millions of clicks to search through. Based on this approach, we design and implement the scalable session-based recommender system Serenade, which is in production usage at bol.com, a large European e-commerce platform.

We evaluate the predictive performance of VMIS-kNN, and show that Serenade can answer a thousand recommendation requests per second with a 90th percentile latency of less than seven milliseconds in scenarios with millions of items to recommend. Furthermore, we present results from a three week long online A/B test with up to 600 requests per second for 6.5 million distinct items on more than 45 million user sessions from our e-commerce platform. To the best of our knowledge, we provide the first empirical evidence that the superior predictive performance of nearest neighbor approaches to session-based recommendation in offline evaluations translates to superior performance in a real world e-commerce setting.
items.abstract_zh:
基于会话的推荐根据用户过去与其他项目的交互序列来预测用户将与之交互的下一个项目。该机器学习问题针对电子商务平台的核心场景，旨在向浏览网站的用户推荐有趣的商品。由于潜在会话的输入空间呈指数级增长，基于会话的推荐器很难扩展。这阻碍了推荐的离线预计算，并且意味着在下一项推荐的在线计算期间维持状态的必要性。

我们提出了 VMIS-kNN，它是对基于会话的推荐的最先进的最近邻方法的改编，它利用预构建的索引在具有数亿次点击搜索的场景中以低延迟计算下一项推荐。基于这种方法，我们设计并实现了可扩展的基于会话的推荐系统 Serenade，该系统已在欧洲大型电子商务平台 bol.com 投入使用。

我们评估了 VMIS-kNN 的预测性能，结果表明，在有数百万个推荐项目的场景中，Serenade 每秒可以响应 1000 个推荐请求，并且 90% 的延迟小于 7 毫秒。此外，我们还展示了为期三周的在线 A/B 测试的结果，在我们的电子商务平台上超过 4500 万个用户会话中，每秒对 650 万个不同项目发出高达 600 个请求。据我们所知，我们提供了第一个经验证据，证明离线评估中基于会话的推荐的最近邻方法的卓越预测性能可以转化为现实世界电子商务环境中的卓越性能。

items.title: Learned Cardinality Estimation: An In-depth Study.
items.abstract:
Learned cardinality estimation (CE) has recently gained significant attention for replacing long-studied traditional CE with machine learning, especially for deep learning. However, these estimators were developed independently and have not been fairly or comprehensively compared in common settings. Most studies use a subset of IMDB data which is too simple to measure their limits and determine whether they are ready for real, complex data. Furthermore, they are regarded as black boxes, without a deep understanding of why large errors occur.

In this paper, we first provide a taxonomy and a unified workflow of learned estimators for a better understanding of estimators. We next comprehensively compare recent learned CE methods that support joins, from a subset of tables to full IMDB and TPC-DS datasets. Under the experimental results, we then demystify the black-box models and analyze critical components that cause large errors. We also measure their impact on query optimization. Finally, based on the findings, we suggest realizable research opportunities. We believe that a deeper understanding of the behavior of existing methods can provide a more comprehensive and substantial framework for developing better estimators.
items.abstract_zh:
学习基数估计（CE）最近因用机器学习（尤其是深度学习）取代长期研究的传统 CE 而受到广泛关注。然而，这些估计器是独立开发的，尚未在常见环境中进行公平或全面的比较。大多数研究使用 IMDB 数据的子集，这些数据太简单，无法衡量其局限性并确定它们是否准备好处理真实、复杂的数据。此外，它们被视为黑匣子，没有深入了解为什么会出现大错误。

在本文中，我们首先提供学习估计器的分类和统一工作流程，以便更好地理解估计器。接下来，我们全面比较最近学习的支持连接的 CE 方法，从表的子集到完整的 IMDB 和 TPC-DS 数据集。根据实验结果，我们揭开了黑盒模型的神秘面纱，并分析了导致较大误差的关键组件。我们还衡量它们对查询优化的影响。最后，根据研究结果，我们建议可实现的研究机会。我们相信，对现有方法的行为进行更深入的了解可以为开发更好的估计器提供更全面和更实质性的框架。

items.title: DenForest: Enabling Fast Deletion in Incremental Density-Based Clustering over Sliding Windows.
items.abstract: The density-based clustering is utilized for various applications such as hot spot detection or segmentation. To serve those applications in real time, it is desired to update clusters incrementally by capturing only the recent data. The previous incremental density-based clustering algorithms often represent clusters as a graph and suffer serious performance degradation. This is because a costly graph traversal is required to check whether a cluster is still connected whenever a point is removed. In order to address the problem of slow deletion, this paper proposes a novel incremental density-based clustering algorithm called DenForest. By maintaining clusters as a group of spanning trees instead of a graph, DenForest can determine efficiently and accurately whether a cluster is to be split by a point removed from the window in logarithmic time. With extensive evaluations, it is demonstrated that DenForest outperforms the state-of-the-art density-based clustering algorithms significantly and achieves the clustering quality comparable with that of DBSCAN.
items.abstract_zh: 基于密度的聚类用于各种应用，例如热点检测或分割。为了实时服务这些应用程序，需要通过仅捕获最近的数据来增量更新集群。以前基于增量密度的聚类算法通常将聚类表示为图，并且性能严重下降。这是因为每当删除一个点时，就需要进行昂贵的图遍历来检查簇是否仍然连接。为了解决删除速度慢的问题，本文提出了一种新的基于增量密度的聚类算法DenForest。通过将簇维护为一组生成树而不是图，DenForest 可以高效、准确地确定簇是否要在对数时间内被从窗口中删除的点分割。经过广泛的评估，结果表明 DenForest 显着优于最先进的基于密度的聚类算法，并实现了与 DBSCAN 相当的聚类质量。

items.title: DMCS : Density Modularity based Community Search.
items.abstract: Community Search, or finding a connected subgraph (known as a community) containing the given query nodes in a social network, is a fundamental problem. Most of the existing community search models only focus on the internal cohesiveness of a community. However, a high-quality community often has high modularity, which means dense connections inside communities and sparse connections to the nodes outside the community. In this paper, we conduct a pioneer study on searching a community with high modularity. We point out that while modularity has been popularly used in community detection (without query nodes), it has not been adopted for community search, surprisingly, and its application in community search (related to query nodes) brings in new challenges. We address these challenges by designing a new graph modularity function named Density Modularity. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on the community search problem using graph modularity. The community search based on the density modularity, termed as DMCS, is to find a community in a social network that contains all the query nodes and has high density-modularity. We prove that the DMCS problem is NP-hard. To efficiently address DMCS, we present new algorithms that run in log-linear time to the graph size. We conduct extensive experimental studies in real-world and synthetic networks, which offer insights into the efficiency and effectiveness of our algorithms. In particular, our algorithm achieves up to 8.5 times higher accuracy in terms of NMI than baseline algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 社区搜索，或者在社交网络中查找包含给定查询节点的连通子图（称为社区），是一个基本问题。现有的社区搜索模型大多数只关注社区的内部凝聚力。然而，高质量的社区往往具有较高的模块化程度，这意味着社区内部连接密集，而与社区外部节点的连接稀疏。在本文中，我们对寻找高度模块化的社区进行了开创性的研究。我们指出，虽然模块化已广泛用于社区检测（没有查询节点），但令人惊讶的是，它尚未被用于社区搜索，并且其在社区搜索（与查询节点相关）中的应用带来了新的挑战。我们通过设计一种名为“密度模块化”的新图模块化函数来应对这些挑战。据我们所知，这是第一个使用图模块化来解决社区搜索问题的工作。基于密度模块化的社区搜索，称为DMCS，是在社交网络中寻找包含所有查询节点且具有高密度模块化的社区。我们证明了 DMCS 问题是 NP 困难的。为了有效地解决 DMCS，我们提出了新的算法，该算法在图大小的对数线性时间内运行。我们在现实世界和合成网络中进行了广泛的实验研究，这为我们算法的效率和有效性提供了见解。特别是，我们的算法在 NMI 方面的准确度比基线算法高出 8.5 倍。

items.title: Diva: Making MVCC Systems HTAP-Friendly.
items.abstract: Multiversion concurrency control (MVCC) and design principles thereof are ingrained in modern database management systems, thus promoting remarkable progress in managing online transaction processing (OLTP) workloads for decades. However, MVCC systems would battle two vital concerns when facing hybrid transactional/analytical processing (HTAP). The first concern is to ensure rapid version searching for analytic queries with less I/O, and the second concern is to reclaim garbage data versions promptly for easing the strain on storage footprint. These are often tightly coupled since many MVCC systems rely on unified version storage that poses a space-time tradeoff in HTAP, giving rise to disappointing performance metrics that may negatively stereotype OLTP-friendly MVCC systems. This paper refutes the stereotype resulting from coupled design concerns and addresses the core problem by proposing Diva (Decoupling Index from Version dAta) that physically separates version index from version data; for decoupled concerns, we devise independent management policies: provisional version indexing and time interval-based version garbage collection. The separation of coupled concerns would render legacy disk-based MVCC systems more HTAP-friendly. We applied Diva to two full-fledged database systems---PostgreSQL and MySQL---and demonstrated that the systems with Diva escaped the space-time tradeoff under hybrid transactional/analytical workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 多版本并发控制 (MVCC) 及其设计原则在现代数据库管理系统中根深蒂固，从而推动了数十年来管理在线事务处理 (OLTP) 工作负载的显着进步。然而，MVCC 系统在面对混合事务/分析处理 (HTAP) 时将面临两个重要问题。第一个关注点是确保以更少的 I/O 快速进行分析查询的版本搜索，第二个关注点是及时回收垃圾数据版本以缓解存储占用的压力。这些通常是紧密耦合的，因为许多 MVCC 系统依赖于统一版本存储，这在 HTAP 中造成了时空权衡，导致令人失望的性能指标，可能会对 OLTP 友好的 MVCC 系统产生负面印象。本文驳斥了由于耦合设计问题而产生的刻板印象，并通过提出Diva（Decoupling Index from Version dAta）来解决核心问题，该技术将版本索引与版本数据物理分离；对于解耦的关注点，我们设计了独立的管理策略：临时版本索引和基于时间间隔的版本垃圾收集。耦合关注点的分离将使传统的基于磁盘的 MVCC 系统对 HTAP 更加友好。我们将 Diva 应用于两个成熟的数据库系统——PostgreSQL 和 MySQL——并证明采用 Diva 的系统在混合事务/分析工作负载下避免了时空权衡。

items.title: Proteus: A Self-Designing Range Filter.
items.abstract: We introduce Proteus, a novel self-designing approximate range filter, which configures itself based on sampled data in order to optimize its false positive rate (FPR) for a given space requirement. Proteus unifies the probabilistic and deterministic design spaces of state-of-the-art range filters to achieve robust performance across a larger variety of use cases. At the core of Proteus lies our Contextual Prefix FPR (CPFPR) model - a formal framework for the FPR of prefix-based filters across their design spaces. We empirically demonstrate the accuracy of our model and Proteus' ability to optimize over both synthetic workloads and real-world datasets. We further evaluate Proteus in RocksDB and show that it is able to improve end-to-end performance by as much as 5.3x over more brittle state-of-the-art methods such as SuRF and Rosetta. Our experiments also indicate that the cost of modeling is not significant compared to the end-to-end performance gains and that Proteus is robust to workload shifts.
items.abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Proteus，一种新颖的自行设计的近似范围过滤器，它根据采样数据进行自身配置，以便针对给定的空间要求优化其误报率 (FPR)。 Proteus 统一了最先进的范围滤波器的概率性和确定性设计空间，以在更广泛的用例中实现稳健的性能。 Proteus 的核心在于我们的上下文前缀 FPR (CPFPR) 模型 - 跨设计空间的基于前缀的滤波器的 FPR 的正式框架。我们凭经验证明了模型的准确性以及 Proteus 对合成工作负载和实际数据集进行优化的能力。我们进一步评估了 RocksDB 中的 Proteus，结果表明，与 SuRF 和 Rosetta 等更脆弱的最先进方法相比，它能够将端到端性能提高多达 5.3 倍。我们的实验还表明，与端到端性能提升相比，建模成本并不显着，而且 Proteus 对工作负载变化具有鲁棒性。

items.title: The Price of Tailoring the Index to Your Data: Poisoning Attacks on Learned Index Structures.
items.abstract:
The concept of learned index structures relies on the idea that the input-output functionality of a database index can be viewed as a prediction task and, thus, implemented using a machine learning model instead of traditional algorithmic techniques. This novel angle for a decades-old problem has inspired exciting results at the intersection of machine learning and data structures. However, the advantage of learned index structures, i.e., the ability to adjust to the data at hand via the underlying ML-model, can become a disadvantage from a security perspective as it could be exploited.

In this work, we present the first study of data poisoning attacks on learned index structures. Our poisoning approach is different from all previous works since the model under attack is trained on a cumulative distribution function (CDF) and, thus, every injection on the training set has a cascading impact on multiple data values. We formulate the first poisoning attacks on linear regression models trained on a CDF, which is a basic building block of the proposed learned index structures. We generalize our poisoning techniques to attack the advanced two-stage design of learned index structures called recursive model index (RMI), which has been shown to outperform traditional B-Trees. We evaluate our attacks under a variety of parameterizations of the model and show that the error of the RMI increases up to 300x and the error of its second-stage models increases up to 3000x.
items.abstract_zh:
学习索引结构的概念依赖于这样的想法：数据库索引的输入输出功能可以被视为预测任务，因此可以使用机器学习模型而不是传统的算法技术来实现。这个解决数十年历史问题的新颖角度激发了机器学习和数据结构交叉领域令人兴奋的结果。然而，从安全角度来看，学习索引结构的优势（即通过底层机器学习模型调整手头数据的能力）可能会成为劣势，因为它可能会被利用。

在这项工作中，我们首次研究了对学习索引结构的数据中毒攻击。我们的中毒方法与之前的所有工作不同，因为受到攻击的模型是根据累积分布函数（CDF）进行训练的，因此，训练集上的每次注入都会对多个数据值产生级联影响。我们对在 CDF 上训练的线性回归模型制定了第一次中毒攻击，CDF 是所提出的学习索引结构的基本构建块。我们推广我们的中毒技术来攻击学习索引结构的高级两阶段设计，称为递归模型索引（RMI），它已被证明优于传统的 B 树。我们在模型的各种参数化下评估我们的攻击，结果表明 RMI 的误差增加了 300 倍，第二阶段模型的误差增加了 3000 倍。

items.title: Everest: A Top-K Deep Video Analytics System.
items.abstract: The impressive accuracy of deep neural networks (DNNs) has created great demands on practical analytics over video data. Although efficient and accurate, the latest video analytic systems have not supported analytics beyond selection and aggregation queries. In data analytics, Top-K is a very important analytical operation that enables analysts to focus on the most important entities. In this demonstration, we present Everest, the first system that supports efficient and accurate Top-K video analytics. Everest ranks and identifies the most interesting frames/clips from videos with probabilistic guarantees. Furthermore, it supports user-defined functions to rank frames/clips based on different semantics using different deep vision models. Everest leverages techniques from computer vision, uncertain databases, and Top-K query processing to return results quickly.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 令人印象深刻的准确性对视频数据的实际分析提出了巨大的要求。尽管高效且准确，但最新的视频分析系统不支持选择和聚合查询之外的分析。在数据分析中，Top-K是一种非常重要的分析操作，它使分析师能够专注于最重要的实体。在本次演示中，我们展示了 Everest，这是第一个支持高效、准确的 Top-K 视频分析的系统。 Everest 通过概率保证对视频中最有趣的帧/剪辑进行排名和识别。此外，它支持用户定义的函数，使用不同的深度视觉模型根据不同的语义对帧/剪辑进行排名。 Everest 利用计算机视觉、不确定数据库和 Top-K 查询处理技术来快速返回结果。

items.title: On a Quest for Combating Filter Bubbles and Misinformation.
items.abstract:
The advent of social networks and media has made it easier than ever for users to access up-to-date information as well as share news and views on matters of the world with many of their peers. Unfortunately, it has also led to increased societal polarization as well as deteriorating trust in institutions. Two of the problems that are blamed for this are filter bubbles and misinformation. Filter bubbles are the result of excessive personalization which has the benefit of enhancing relevance but comes at the price of limiting the exposure of users to a specific viewpoint. They are amplified by the so-called echo chambers that exist in social media, whereby members of a community mutually reinforce a fixed opinion or viewpoint on an issue. Misinformation, on the other hand, tends to propagate through the network, and studies show it does so faster and more virally than truth.

Both problems manifest themselves in the form of groups of actors working in concert and providing mutual reinforcement. How can we recognize these groups? Having detected them, how can we counteract these problems? The first question can benefit from an examination of techniques developed to search for communities or more generally dense subgraphs from an underlying network. As for the second question, a natural approach for countering filter bubbles is to launch some kind of counter-campaign to try and enhance the balance in users' exposure to viewpoints. Countermeasures for misinformation propagating through a network, on the other hand, are manifold and can depend on who is planning the countermeasure. For example, the network host can intervene and take steps to limit the propagation of misinformation, but these actions come with a cost. Besides the political sensitivity and cost of limiting freedom of expression, what if the intervention was by mistake done on genuine information? As another example, a third party interested in countering the propagation of misinformation may launch a counter-campaign. Interestingly, some of the ideas behind designing such campaigns have strong connections to a classic problem called Influence Maximization, studied in a very different context, driven by different applications like viral marketing, infection containment, and revenue or welfare maximization. In this talk, we will examine research on detecting dense subgraphs as well as competitive influence maximization and discuss how that can inspire techniques for addressing the two problems above.
items.abstract_zh:
社交网络和媒体的出现使用户比以往任何时候都更容易获取最新信息以及与许多同龄人分享有关世界事务的新闻和观点。不幸的是，这也导致了社会两极分化的加剧以及对机构信任的恶化。造成这种情况的两个问题是过滤气泡和错误信息。过滤气泡是过度个性化的结果，它的好处是增强相关性，但代价是限制用户接触特定的观点。它们被社交媒体中存在的所谓回声室放大，社区成员通过社交媒体相互强化对某个问题的固定意见或观点。另一方面，错误信息往往通过网络传播，研究表明它比事实传播得更快、更具有病毒性。

这两个问题都以行动者群体协同工作并相互加强的形式表现出来。我们如何认识这些群体？发现这些问题后，我们该如何应对这些问题呢？第一个问题可以受益于对从底层网络中搜索社区或更普遍的密集子图而开发的技术的检查。至于第二个问题，对抗过滤泡沫的一个自然方法是发起某种反运动，以尝试增强用户接触观点的平衡。另一方面，针对通过网络传播错误信息的对策是多种多样的，并且可能取决于谁在计划对策。例如，网络主机可以进行干预并采取措施限制错误信息的传播，但这些行为是有代价的。除了限制言论自由的政治敏感性和成本之外，如果错误地根据真实信息进行干预怎么办？作为另一个例子，对打击错误信息传播感兴趣的第三方可能会发起反运动。有趣的是，设计此类活动背后的一些想法与一个名为“影响力最大化”的经典问题有着密切的联系，该问题是在一个非常不同的背景下进行研究的，受到病毒式营销、感染遏制以及收入或福利最大化等不同应用的驱动。在本次演讲中，我们将研究检测密集子图以及竞争影响力最大化的研究，并讨论如何激发解决上述两个问题的技术。

items.title: X-SSD: A Storage System with Native Support for Database Logging and Replication.
items.abstract:
Transaction logging and log shipping are standard techniques to provide recoverability and high availability in data management systems. They entail an update to a local log file at every transaction and sending such an update to a remote site in a coordinated fashion. Modern databases have leveraged technologies such as Persistent Memory (PM) and RDMA-enabled networking to perform these updates as fast as possible. This mix of technologies, however, presents several drawbacks: some technologies are not portable, restricting deployments to a single class of machines; they make the data path more contrived; and they force very low-level APIs to interoperate, posing severe correctness issues.

In this paper, we introduce the X-SSD, an SSD architecture that mixes NAND Flash and PM and that offers similar top performance while avoiding these issues. X-SSD devices can take transaction log writes in a fast, PM-backed data path and offer Data Propagation Services that move these writes to remote sites and eventually to NAND Flash storage. To validate this new architecture, we design and implement an actual reference X-SSD device called Villars. Our experiments show that the Villars device can manage PM and remote transfers on behalf of the database in a faster, more straightforward, and more robust way. We believe that our new architecture and reference implementation can reignite the conversation between the database and storage communities about the potential of co-designed devices.
items.abstract_zh:
事务日志记录和日志传送是在数据管理系统中提供可恢复性和高可用性的标准技术。它们需要在每次事务时更新本地日志文件，并以协调的方式将此类更新发送到远程站点。现代数据库利用持久内存 (PM) 和支持 RDMA 的网络等技术来尽快执行这些更新。然而，这种技术组合存在一些缺点：某些技术不可移植，限制了部署到单一类别的机器；它们使数据路径更加人为；它们迫使非常低级的 API 进行互操作，从而带来严重的正确性问题。

在本文中，我们介绍了 X-SSD，这是一种混合 NAND 闪存和 PM 的 SSD 架构，可提供类似的顶级性能，同时避免这些问题。 X-SSD 设备可以在快速、PM 支持的数据路径中进行事务日志写入，并提供数据传播服务，将这些写入移动到远程站点并最终移动到 NAND 闪存存储。为了验证这个新架构，我们设计并实现了一个名为 Villars 的实际参考 X-SSD 设备。我们的实验表明，Villars 设备可以以更快、更直接、更稳健的方式代表数据库管理 PM 和远程传输。我们相信，我们的新架构和参考实现可以重新引发数据库和存储社区之间关于共同设计设备潜力的对话。

items.title: Warper: Efficiently Adapting Learned Cardinality Estimators to Data and Workload Drifts.
items.abstract: Recent learned cardinality estimation (CE) models are vulnerable when query predicates or the underlying datasets drift from what the models were trained upon. We propose a system Warper that accelerates model adaptation to drifts; Warper generates additional queries when limited examples are available from the new workload and carefully picks which queries to use to update the CE model. We show that Warper can be used to adapt different CE models including ones that support queries over single tables and join expressions. Experiments with different drifts suggest that Warper has a small computational cost and adapts much faster compared to state-of-the-art solutions. We also show that faster model adaptation improves query performance by shortening the period for which imperfect query plans are picked by a query optimizer due to incorrect cardinality estimates.
items.abstract_zh: 当查询谓词或底层数据集偏离模型训练的内容时，最近学习的基数估计 (CE) 模型很容易受到攻击。我们提出了一个 Warper 系统，可以加速模型对漂移的适应；当新工作负载中可用的示例有限时，Warper 会生成额外的查询，并仔细选择用于更新 CE 模型的查询。我们展示了 Warper 可用于适应不同的 CE 模型，包括支持对单个表和连接表达式进行查询的模型。不同漂移的实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Warper 的计算成本较小，并且适应速度要快得多。我们还表明，更快的模型适应可以通过缩短查询优化器由于不正确的基数估计而选择不完美查询计划的时间来提高查询性能。

items.title: Camel: Managing Data for Efficient Stream Learning.
items.abstract: Many real-world applications rely on predictive models that are incrementally learned online. Specifically, models are updated with a single pass over continuously arriving data batches in a typical stream learning framework. However, this framework has three shortcomings: high training cost, low data effectiveness, and catastrophic forgetting. We describe Camel, a system that addresses the above issues. Camel includes two independent data management components: coreset selection and buffer update. To accelerate model training, Camel selects a coreset from each streaming data batch for model update. Selecting a coreset with worst-case guarantees is NP-hard. To solve this problem, we reformulate coreset selection as a submodular maximization problem by deriving an upper bound on the objective function. To mitigate catastrophic forgetting, Camel maintains a buffer of past representative samples as new data arrive. Moreover, Camel quantizes numerical data in buffer via a quantile sketch to reduce the memory footprint. Finally, extensive experiments validate the effectiveness and efficiency of Camel. In particular, our coreset selection algorithm can achieve a linear speedup with a marginal accuracy loss on redundant datasets. Furthermore, our buffer update algorithms can outperform the state-of-the-art methods for anti-forgetting on various data distributions.
items.abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的应用程序依赖于在线增量学习的预测模型。具体来说，在典型的流学习框架中，模型通过一次连续到达的数据批次进行更新。然而，该框架存在三个缺点：训练成本高、数据有效性低、灾难性遗忘。我们描述了 Camel，一个解决上述问题的系统。 Camel包括两个独立的数据管理组件：核心集选择和缓冲区更新。为了加速模型训练，Camel 从每个流数据批次中选择一个核心集进行模型更新。选择具有最坏情况保证的核心集是 NP 困难的。为了解决这个问题，我们通过推导目标函数的上限将核心集选择重新表述为子模最大化问题。为了减轻灾难性遗忘，当新数据到达时，Camel 会维护过去代表性样本的缓冲区。此外，Camel 通过分位数草图量化缓冲区中的数值数据，以减少内存占用。最后，大量的实验验证了 Camel 的有效性和效率。特别是，我们的核心集选择算法可以在冗余数据集上实现线性加速，同时带来边际精度损失。此外，我们的缓冲区更新算法可以超越各种数据分布上最先进的防遗忘方法。

items.title: Spatial Data Quality in the IoT Era: Management and Exploitation.
items.abstract: Within the rapidly expanding Internet of Things (IoT), growing amounts of spatially referenced data are being generated. Due to the dynamic, decentralized, and heterogeneous nature of the IoT, spatial IoT data (SID) quality has attracted considerable attention in academia and industry. How to invent and use technologies for managing spatial data quality and exploiting low-quality spatial data are key challenges in the IoT. In this tutorial, we highlight the SID consumption requirements in applications and offer an overview of spatial data quality in the IoT setting. In addition, we review pertinent technologies for quality management and low-quality data exploitation, and we identify trends and future directions for quality-aware SID management and utilization. The tutorial aims to not only help researchers and practitioners to better comprehend SID quality challenges and solutions, but also offer insights that may enable innovative research and applications.
items.abstract_zh: 在快速扩展的物联网 (IoT) 中，正在生成越来越多的空间参考数据。由于物联网的动态、分散和异构性质，空间物联网数据（SID）质量引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。如何发明和使用管理空间数据质量和利用低质量空间数据的技术是物联网的关键挑战。在本教程中，我们重点介绍应用程序中的 SID 消耗要求，并概述 IoT 设置中的空间数据质量。此外，我们还回顾了质量管理和低质量数据开发的相关技术，并确定了质量意识 SID 管理和利用的趋势和未来方向。本教程不仅旨在帮助研究人员和从业人员更好地理解 SID 质量挑战和解决方案，而且还提供可能实现创新研究和应用的见解。

items.title: Unsupervised Contextual Anomaly Detection for Database Systems.
items.abstract: Abnormal data access operations in database systems always hap-pen, which are typically incurred by misoperations or attacks, though these systems are enforced with strict access control policies. However, prior arts only focus on detecting abnormal data accesses by utilizing known attack patterns or identifying behaviors significantly deviated from normal behaviors. They cannot capture stealthy abnormal data access operations that are similar to normal ones. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised anomaly detection system UCAD, which aims to detect abnormal data access operations, by comparing operation's semantics with their contextual intent. However, it is non-trivial to obtain accurate semantics of operations for intent analysis because (i) the same operation may exhibit diverse semantics under different operation contexts and (ii) different operation sequences could have identical semantics due to heterogeneous user access patterns. To address this issue, we develop a new transformer model called Trans-DAS for UCAD. Trans-DAS learns the semantics of individual operations by utilizing the attention mechanism that analyzes the relevance between any pair of operations in sequence, and captures the contextual intent of operations inferred from the contexts. Specifically, Trans-DAS utilizes a particular embedding layer to embed the semantics of individual operations without the operation order information and a masking mechanism that allows Trans-DAS to learn the semantics according to the bidirectional contexts. Also, we define a new training objective for Trans-DAS to enlarge the difference among the embedded semantics. Furthermore, in order to effectively utilize Trans-DAS for detection, we develop two modules in UCAD, i.e., a data preprocessing module that allows Trans-DAS to accurately learn the normal semantic information by removing noisy data, and an anomaly detection module that learns the semantic information for intent comparison. We evaluate the performance of UCAD on real-world data traces under different settings (e.g., varied parameters and hybrid datasets). The results demonstrate that UCAD achieves the average F1-score of 0.94 in two scenarios, which significantly outperform baselines, and shows robustness to hybrid data and good transferability to different tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管数据库系统执行了严格的访问控制策略，但数据库系统中经常会发生异常的数据访问操作，通常是由于误操作或攻击而引起的。然而，现有技术仅关注于利用已知的攻击模式来检测异常数据访问或识别明显偏离正常行为的行为。它们无法捕获与正常数据访问操作类似的隐秘异常数据访问操作。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督异常检测系统UCAD，旨在通过将操作的语义与其上下文意图进行比较来检测异常数据访问操作。然而，获得准确的操作语义以进行意图分析并非易事，因为（i）相同的操作可能在不同的操作上下文下表现出不同的语义，并且（ii）由于异构的用户访问模式，不同的操作序列可能具有相同的语义。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种名为 Trans-DAS for UCAD 的新变压器模型。 Trans-DAS 通过利用注意力机制来学习各个操作的语义，该机制会按顺序分析任意一对操作之间的相关性，并捕获从上下文中推断出的操作的上下文意图。具体来说，Trans-DAS 利用特定的嵌入层来嵌入各个操作的语义，而无需操作顺序信息和允许 Trans-DAS 根据双向上下文学习语义的屏蔽机制。此外，我们为 Trans-DAS 定义了一个新的训练目标，以扩大嵌入语义之间的差异。此外，为了有效利用Trans-DAS进行检测，我们在UCAD中开发了两个模块，即数据预处理模块，允许Trans-DAS通过去除噪声数据来准确学习正常语义信息，以及异常检测模块，学习语义信息以进行意图比较。我们评估 UCAD 在不同设置（例如，不同参数和混合数据集）下的真实数据轨迹上的性能。结果表明，UCAD 在两种情况下实现了 0.94 的平均 F1 分数，显着优于基线，并显示出对混合数据的鲁棒性和对不同任务的良好可迁移性。

items.title: One Set to Cover All Maximal Cliques Approximately.
items.abstract: Maximal clique, the most cohesive structure in a graph, has a broad range of applications, e.g., community detection, bioinformatics, anomaly detection, and graph visualization. However, the sheer number of maximal cliques brings the challenge to fully examine them all. In addition, the omnipresent overlaps between cliques imply that it may not be necessary to process every maximal clique, since many vertices are shared in multiple cliques. A real example is that, in commercial advertising, a small group of individuals who participate in different communities can help spread an advertisement across all the communities. Inspired by this observation, we study the problem of finding a τ-cover, which is a subset of vertices in a graph. This subset overlaps with each maximal clique by no less than τ, where τ is a threshold reflecting the user's requirement. We prove the NP-hardness and the non-submodularity of finding a minimum τ-cover. As a result, to find a small τ-cover as best effort, we propose three methods: MCCb, MCC, and EMCC. MCCb is a baseline that adds vertices into the cover while doing clique enumeration until the coverage requirement is satisfied. MCC decides whether to add a vertex with more caution by evaluating the increment of coverage lower bound with O(1) time complexity. EMCC is a randomized algorithm built on an elegant adaptive sampling, which further achieves cover conciseness by relaxing the coverage requirement in a statistical manner. Extensive experiments show that MCC (1.3 ∽ 2.5 × faster) produces a cover whose size is 1/2 of MCCb, and EMCC (2 ∽ 5 × faster) averagely produces a cover whose size is one order of magnitude smaller vs. MCCb.
items.abstract_zh: 最大团是图中最具凝聚力的结构，具有广泛的应用，例如社区检测、生物信息学、异常检测和图形可视化。然而，最大派系的数量之多给全面检查它们带来了挑战。此外，派系之间无所不在的重叠意味着可能没有必要处理每个最大派系，因为许多顶点在多个派系中共享。一个真实的例子是，在商业广告中，参与不同社区的一小群人可以帮助将广告传播到所有社区。受这一观察的启发，我们研究了寻找 τ 覆盖的问题，它是图中顶点的子集。该子集与每个最大团的重叠不少于τ，其中τ是反映用户需求的阈值。我们证明了寻找最小 τ 覆盖的 NP 难度和非子模性。因此，为了尽最大努力找到小的 τ-cover，我们提出了三种方法：MCCb、MCC 和 EMCC。 MCCb 是一条基线，在进行团枚举时将顶点添加到覆盖中，直到满足覆盖要求。 MCC通过以O(1)时间复杂度评估覆盖下界的增量来决定是否更谨慎地添加顶点。 EMCC 是一种基于优雅自适应采样的随机算法，通过以统计方式放宽覆盖要求，进一步实现覆盖简洁性。大量实验表明，MCC（快 1.3 ∽ 2.5 × 快）产生的 cover 大小是 MCCb 的 1/2，而 EMCC（快 2 ∽ 5 × 快）平均产生的 cover 大小比 MCCb 小一个数量级。

items.title: Efficient Personalized PageRank Computation: A Spanning Forests Sampling Based Approach.
items.abstract: Computing the personalized PageRank vector is a fundamental problem in graph analysis. In this paper, we propose several novel algorithms to efficiently compute the personalized PageRank vector with a decay factor α based on an interesting connection between the personalized PageRank values and the weights of random spanning forests of the graph. Such a connection is derived based on a newly-developed matrix forest theorem on graphs. Based on this, we present an efficient spanning forest sampling algorithm via simulating loop-erased α-random walks to estimate the personalized PageRank vector. Compared to all existing methods, a striking feature of our approach is that its performance is insensitive w.r.t. (with respect to) the parameter α. As a consequence, our algorithm is often much faster than the state-of-the-art algorithms when α is small, which is the demanding case for many graph analysis tasks. We show that our technique can significantly improve the efficiency of the state-of-the-art algorithms for answering two well-studied personalized PageRank queries, including single source query and single target query. Extensive experiments on seven large real-world graphs demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed method.
items.abstract_zh: 计算个性化PageRank向量是图分析中的一个基本问题。在本文中，我们提出了几种新颖的算法，基于个性化 PageRank 值和图的随机生成森林权重之间的有趣联系，使用衰减因子 α 有效地计算个性化 PageRank 向量。这种连接是基于新开发的图矩阵森林定理推导出来的。基于此，我们提出了一种有效的生成森林采样算法，通过模拟循环擦除的α随机游走来估计个性化PageRank向量。与所有现有方法相比，我们的方法的一个显着特征是其性能对 w.r.t. 不敏感。 （相对于）参数α。因此，当 α 很小时，我们的算法通常比最先进的算法快得多，这是许多图分析任务的苛刻情况。我们表明，我们的技术可以显着提高最先进算法的效率，以回答两个经过充分研究的个性化 PageRank 查询，包括单源查询和单目标查询。对七个大型现实世界图的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的效率。

items.title: Network Shuffling: Privacy Amplification via Random Walks.
items.abstract:
Recently, it is shown that shuffling can amplify the central differential privacy guarantees of data randomized with local differential privacy. Within this setup, a centralized, trusted shuffler is responsible for shuffling by keeping the identities of data anonymous, which subsequently leads to stronger privacy guarantees for systems. However, introducing a centralized entity to the originally local privacy model loses some appeals of not having any centralized entity as in local differential privacy. Moreover, implementing a shuffler in a reliable way is not trivial due to known security issues and/or requirements of advanced hardware or secure computation technology.

Motivated by these practical considerations, we rethink the shuffle model to relax the assumption of requiring a centralized, trusted shuffler. We introduce network shuffling, a decentralized mechanism where users exchange data in a random-walk fashion on a network/graph, as an alternative of achieving privacy amplification via anonymity. We analyze the threat model under such a setting, and propose distributed protocols of network shuffling that is straightforward to implement in practice. Furthermore, we show that the privacy amplification rate is similar to other privacy amplification techniques such as uniform shuffling. To our best knowledge, among the recently studied intermediate trust models that leverage privacy amplification techniques, our work is the first that is not relying on any centralized entity to achieve privacy amplification.
items.abstract_zh:
最近，研究表明，混洗可以放大使用本地差分隐私随机化的数据的中央差分隐私保证。在此设置中，一个集中的、可信的洗牌器负责通过保持数据身份匿名来进行洗牌，从而为系统带来更强的隐私保证。然而，在原来的本地隐私模型中引入中心化实体，失去了本地差分隐私中没有中心化实体的一些吸引力。此外，由于已知的安全问题和/或先进硬件或安全计算技术的要求，以可靠的方式实现洗牌器并非易事。

出于这些实际考虑的动机，我们重新考虑洗牌模型，以放宽需要集中式、可信洗牌器的假设。我们引入网络洗牌，这是一种去中心化机制，用户在网络/图上以随机游走的方式交换数据，作为通过匿名实现隐私放大的替代方案。我们分析了这种设置下的威胁模型，并提出了在实践中易于实现的分布式网络改组协议。此外，我们表明隐私放大率与其他隐私放大技术（例如均匀洗牌）相似。据我们所知，在最近研究的利用隐私放大技术的中间信任模型中，我们的工作是第一个不依赖任何中心化实体来实现隐私放大的工作。

items.title: Reflections on a Career in Computer Science.
items.abstract: Computer Science is a wonderful field with many interesting and important problems to work on. This is true today and was also true in the past; of course what is considered interesting changes as a field matures. In this talk I will discuss some of the problems that I found intriguing. In each case I will discuss the state of the field at the time I did this work to provide an historical context for my work and that of others doing related work. I will also discuss how I selected problems, what I brought to the table, and where the ideas for my solutions came from.
items.abstract_zh: 计算机科学是一个奇妙的领域，有许多有趣且重要的问题需要解决。今天是这样，过去也是如此。当然，随着一个领域的成熟，有趣的东西也会发生变化。在这次演讲中，我将讨论一些我觉得有趣的问题。在每种情况下，我都会讨论我做这项工作时该领域的状况，为我的工作和其他从事相关工作的人提供历史背景。我还将讨论我如何选择问题、我提出了什么以及我的解决方案的想法来自哪里。

items.title: Hybrid Deterministic and Nondeterministic Execution of Transactions in Actor Systems.
items.abstract: The actor model has been widely adopted in building stateful middle-tiers for large-scale interactive applications, where ACID transactions are useful to ensure application correctness. In this paper, we present Snapper, a new transaction library on top of Orleans, a popular actor system. Snapper exploits the characteristics of actor-oriented programming to improve the performance of multi-actor transactions by employing deterministic transaction execution, where pre-declared actor access information is used to generate deterministic execution schedules. The deterministic execution can potentially improve transaction throughput significantly, especially with a high contention level. Besides, Snapper can also execute actor transactions using conventional nondeterministic strategies, including S2PL, to account for scenarios where actor access information cannot be pre-declared. A salient feature of Snapper is the ability to execute concurrent hybrid workloads, where some transactions are executed deterministically while the others are executed nondeterministically. This novel hybrid execution is able to take advantage of the deterministic execution while being able to account for nondeterministic workloads. Our experimental results on two benchmarks show that deterministic execution can achieve up to 2x higher throughput than nondeterministic execution under a skewed workload. Additionally, the hybrid execution strategy can achieve a throughput that is close to deterministic execution when there is only a small percentage of nondeterministic transactions running in the system.
items.abstract_zh: 参与者模型已被广泛应用于为大规模交互式应用程序构建有状态中间层，其中 ACID 事务对于确保应用程序的正确性非常有用。在本文中，我们介绍了 Snapper，这是一个基于 Orleans（流行的 Actor 系统）之上的新事务库。 Snapper 利用面向参与者编程的特点，通过采用确定性事务执行来提高多参与者事务的性能，其中预先声明的参与者访问信息用于生成确定性执行计划。确定性执行可以显着提高事务吞吐量，尤其是在竞争级别较高的情况下。此外，Snapper还可以使用传统的非确定性策略（包括S2PL）执行参与者事务，以解决参与者访问信息无法预先声明的场景。 Snapper 的一个显着特征是能够执行并发混合工作负载，其中某些事务是确定性执行的，而其他事务是非确定性执行的。这种新颖的混合执行能够利用确定性执行，同时能够解决不确定性工作负载。我们在两个基准测试上的实验结果表明，在倾斜的工作负载下，确定性执行可以实现比非确定性执行高出 2 倍的吞吐量。此外，当系统中只有一小部分非确定性事务运行时，混合执行策略可以实现接近确定性执行的吞吐量。

items.title: HAP: An Efficient Hamming Space Index Based on Augmented Pigeonhole Principle.
items.abstract:
The emerging deep learning techniques prefer mapping complex data objects (e.g., images, documents) to compact binary vectors (i.e., hash codes) for efficient similarity search. In this paper, we study the problem of indexing large-scale binary databases to support fast Hamming distance-based similarity queries. Existing Hamming space indices usually divide long binary vectors into short disjoint pieces and apply the Pigeonhole Principle to prune unnecessary candidates. In our work, we relax the disjoint partition constraint by allowing dimension redundancy, which yields a tighter pruning bound named Augmented Pigeonhole Principle (APP). Intuitively, APP enables more optimization opportunities by capturing the correlation between database and query workloads. Based on APP, we propose HAP, an efficient Hamming space index framework to support both Hamming range queries and k-NN queries.

To guide index construction and run-time query optimization, we introduce a novel DL-base query cardinality estimator named SimCardNet. To further reduce the index space cost, we propose a learned index compression scheme by combining the piece-wise linear approximation (PLA) and Elias-Fano encoding. In addition, we also study the problem of optimizing the execution time of a batch of queries using our index framework. The experimental results on large-scale binary databases reveal that our indexing scheme outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in terms of both space and time efficiency.
items.abstract_zh:
新兴的深度学习技术更喜欢将复杂的数据对象（例如图像、文档）映射到紧凑的二进制向量（即哈希码）以进行有效的相似性搜索。在本文中，我们研究了索引大规模二进制数据库以支持基于快速汉明距离的相似性查询的问题。现有的汉明空间索引通常将长的二元向量划分为短的不相交片段，并应用鸽洞原理来修剪不必要的候选者。在我们的工作中，我们通过允许维度冗余来放松不相交分区约束，这会产生更严格的剪枝界限，称为增强鸽子洞原理（APP）。直观地说，APP 通过捕获数据库和查询工作负载之间的相关性来实现更多的优化机会。基于APP，我们提出了HAP，一种高效的汉明空间索引框架，支持汉明范围查询和k-NN查询。

为了指导索引构建和运行时查询优化，我们引入了一种新颖的基于 DL 的查询基数估计器，名为 SimCardNet。为了进一步降低索引空间成本，我们通过结合分段线性近似（PLA）和 Elias-Fano 编码提出了一种学习索引压缩方案。此外，我们还研究了使用索引框架优化一批查询的执行时间的问题。大规模二进制数据库的实验结果表明，我们的索引方案在空间和时间效率方面都优于最先进的基线。

items.title: GHive: A Demonstration of GPU-Accelerated Query Processing in Apache Hive.
items.abstract: As a distributed, fault-tolerant data warehouse system for large-scale data analytics, Apache Hive has been used for various applications in many organizations (e.g., Facebook, Amazon, and Huawei). Exploiting the large degrees of parallelism of GPU to improve the performance of online analytical processing (OLAP) in database system is a common practice in the industry. Meanwhile, it is a common practice to exploit the large degrees of parallelism of GPU to improve the performance of online analytical processing (OLAP) in database systems. This demo presents GHive, which enables Apache Hive to accelerate OLAP queries by jointly utilizing CPU and GPU in intelligent and efficient ways. The takeaways for SIGMOD attendees include: (1) the superior performance of GHive compared with vanilla Hive that only uses CPU; (2) intuitive visualizations of execution statistics for Hive and GHive to understand where the acceleration of GHive comes from; (3) detailed profiling of the time taken by each operator on CPU and GPU to show the advantages of GPU execution.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种用于大规模数据分析的分布式、容错数据仓库系统，Apache Hive 已在许多组织（例如 Facebook、亚马逊和华为）中用于各种应用程序。利用GPU的大程度并行性来提高数据库系统中的在线分析处理（OLAP）性能是业界的常见做法。同时，利用GPU的高度并行性来提高数据库系统中在线分析处理（OLAP）的性能是一种常见的做法。该演示展示了 GHive，它使 Apache Hive 能够以智能且高效的方式联合利用 CPU 和 GPU 来加速 OLAP 查询。 SIGMOD 与会者的收获包括：(1) GHive 与仅使用 CPU 的普通 Hive 相比具有卓越的性能； （2）Hive和GHive的执行统计数据直观可视化，了解GHive的加速从何而来； (3)详细分析每个算子在CPU和GPU上所花费的时间，以显示GPU执行的优势。

items.title: Triton Join: Efficiently Scaling to a Large Join State on GPUs with Fast Interconnects.
items.abstract:
Database management systems are facing growing data volumes. Previous research suggests that GPUs are well-equipped to quickly process joins and similar stateful operators, as GPUs feature high-bandwidth on-board memory. However, GPUs cannot scale joins to large data volumes due to two limiting factors: (1)~large state does not fit into the on-board memory, and (2)~spilling state to main memory is constrained by the interconnect bandwidth. Thus, CPUs are often the better choice for scalable data processing.

In this paper, we propose a new join algorithm that scales to large data volumes by taking advantage of fast interconnects. Fast interconnects such as NVLink~2.0 are a new technology that connect the GPU to main memory at a high bandwidth, and thus enable us to design our join to efficiently spill its state. Our evaluation shows that our Triton join outperforms a no-partitioning hash join by more than 100× on the same GPU, and a radix-partitioned join on the CPU by up to 2.5×. As a result, GPU-enabled DBMSs are able to scale beyond the GPU memory capacity.
items.abstract_zh:
数据库管理系统面临着不断增长的数据量。先前的研究表明，GPU 配备齐全，可以快速处理连接和类似的有状态运算符，因为 GPU 具有高带宽板载内存。然而，由于两个限制因素，GPU 无法将连接扩展到大数据量：(1)~大状态不适合板载内存，(2)~向主内存溢出状态受到互连带宽的限制。因此，CPU 通常是可扩展数据处理的更好选择。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新的连接算法，该算法通过利用快速互连来扩展到大数据量。 NVLink~2.0 等快速互连是一项新技术，它以高带宽将 GPU 连接到主内存，从而使我们能够设计连接以有效地溢出其状态。我们的评估表明，我们的 Triton 连接在相同 GPU 上的性能比无分区哈希连接高出 100 倍以上，在 CPU 上比基数分区连接高出 2.5 倍。因此，支持 GPU 的 DBMS 能够扩展到超出 GPU 内存容量。

items.title: A Convex-Programming Approach for Efficient Directed Densest Subgraph Discovery.
items.abstract: Given a directed graph G, the directed densest subgraph (DDS) problem refers to finding a subgraph from G, whose density is the highest among all subgraphs of G. The DDS problem is fundamental to a wide range of applications, such as fake follower detection and community mining. Theoretically, the DDS problem closely connects to other essential graph problems, such as network flow and bipartite matching. However, existing DDS solutions suffer from efficiency and scalability issues. In this paper, we develop a convex-programming-based solution by transforming the DDS problem into a set of linear programs. Based on the duality of linear programs, we develop efficient exact and approximation algorithms. Especially, our approximation algorithm can support flexible parameterized approximation guarantees. We have performed an extensive empirical evaluation of our approaches on eight real large datasets. The results show that our proposed algorithms are up to five orders of magnitude faster than the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 给定一个有向图 G，有向最密子图 (DDS) 问题是指从 G 中找到一个子图，该子图的密度是 G 的所有子图中最高的。DDS 问题是广泛应用的基础，例如假粉丝检测和社区挖掘。理论上，DDS 问题与其他基本图问题密切相关，例如网络流和二分匹配。然而，现有的 DDS 解决方案存在效率和可扩展性问题。在本文中，我们通过将 DDS 问题转换为一组线性程序来开发基于凸规划的解决方案。基于线性程序的对偶性，我们开发了高效的精确和近似算法。特别是，我们的近似算法可以支持灵活的参数化近似保证。我们在八个真实的大型数据集上对我们的方法进行了广泛的实证评估。结果表明，我们提出的算法比最先进的算法快五个数量级。

items.title: Gloria: Graph-based Sharing Optimizer for Event Trend Aggregation.
items.abstract: Large workloads of event trend aggregation queries are widely deployed to derive high-level insights about current event trends in near real time. To speed-up the execution, we identify and leverage sharing opportunities from complex patterns with flat Kleene operators or even nested Kleene expressions. We propose Gloria, a graph-based sharing optimizer for event trend aggregation. First, we map the sharing optimization problem to a graph path search problem in the Gloria graph with execution costs encoded as weights. Second, we shrink the search space by applying cost-driven pruning principles that guarantee optimality of the reduced Gloria graph in most cases. Lastly, we propose a path search algorithm that identifies the sharing plan with minimum execution costs. Our experimental study on three real-world data sets demonstrates that our Gloria optimizer effectively reduces the search space, leading to 5-fold speed-up in optimization time. The optimized plan consistently reduces the query latency by 68%-93% compared to the plan generated by state-of-the-art approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 事件趋势聚合查询的大量工作负载被广泛部署，以近乎实时地获取有关当前事件趋势的高级见解。为了加快执行速度，我们通过平面 Kleene 运算符甚至嵌套 Kleene 表达式来识别和利用复杂模式中的共享机会。我们提出了 Gloria，一种基于图的共享优化器，用于事件趋势聚合。首先，我们将共享优化问题映射到 Gloria 图中的图路径搜索问题，并将执行成本编码为权重。其次，我们通过应用成本驱动的修剪原则来缩小搜索空间，以保证在大多数情况下简化的 Gloria 图的最优性。最后，我们提出了一种路径搜索算法，以最小的执行成本识别共享计划。我们对三个真实数据集的实验研究表明，我们的 Gloria 优化器有效地减少了搜索空间，从而使优化时间加快了 5 倍。与最先进的方法生成的计划相比，优化的计划始终将查询延迟减少了 68%-93%。

items.title: HiEngine: How to Architect a Cloud-Native Memory-Optimized Database Engine.
items.abstract:
Fast database engines have become an essential building block in many systems and applications. Yet most of them are designed based on on-premise solutions and do not directly work in the cloud. Existing cloud-native database systems are mostly disk resident databases that follow a storage-centric design and exploit the potential of modern cloud infrastructure, such as manycore processors, large main memory and persistent memory. However, in-memory databases are infrequent and untapped.

This paper presents HiEngine, Huawei's cloud-native memory-optimized in-memory database engine that endows hierarchical database architecture and fills this gap. HiEngine simultaneously (1) leverages the cloud infrastructure with reliable storage services on the compute-side (in addition to the storage tier) for fast persistence and reliability, (2) achieves main-memory database engines' high performance, and (3) retains backward compatibility with existing cloud-native database systems. HiEngine is integrated with Huawei GaussDB(for MySQL), it brings the benefits of main-memory database engines to the cloud and co-exists with disk-based engines. Compared to conventional systems, HiEngine outperforms prior storage-centric solutions by up to 7.5X and provides comparable performance to on-premise memory-optimized database engines.
items.abstract_zh:
快速数据库引擎已成为许多系统和应用程序中的重要构建块。然而，它们大多数都是基于本地解决方案设计的，并不直接在云中工作。现有的云原生数据库系统大多是磁盘驻留数据库，遵循以存储为中心的设计，并利用现代云基础设施的潜力，例如多核处理器、大容量主内存和持久内存。然而，内存数据库并不常见且尚未开发。

本文提出的HiEngine是华为云原生内存优化的内存数据库引擎，它赋予了分层数据库架构并填补了这一空白。 HiEngine 同时 (1) 利用云基础设施和计算端（除了存储层）的可靠存储服务来实现快速持久性和可靠性，(2) 实现主存数据库引擎的高性能，以及 (3) 保留与现有云原生数据库系统的向后兼容性。 HiEngine与华为GaussDB(for MySQL)集成，将主存数据库引擎的优势带到云端，并与基于磁盘的引擎共存。与传统系统相比，HiEngine 的性能比之前以存储为中心的解决方案高出 7.5 倍，并提供与本地内存优化数据库引擎相当的性能。

items.title: Evaluating Multi-GPU Sorting with Modern Interconnects.
items.abstract: GPUs have become a mainstream accelerator for database operations such as sorting. Most GPU sorting algorithms are single-GPU approaches. They neither harness the full computational power nor exploit the high-bandwidth P2P interconnects of modern multi-GPU platforms. The latest NVLink 2.0 and NVLink 3.0-based NVSwitch interconnects promise unparalleled multi-GPU acceleration. So far, multi-GPU sorting has only been evaluated on systems with PCIe 3.0. In this paper, we analyze serial, parallel, and bidirectional data transfer rates to, from, and between multiple GPUs on systems with PCIe 3.0/4.0, NVLink 2.0/3.0, and NVSwitch. We measure up to 35x higher parallel P2P throughput with NVLink 3.0-based NVSwitch over PCIe 3.0. To study GPU-accelerated sorting on today's hardware, we implement a P2P-based GPU-only (P2P sort) and a heterogeneous (HET sort) multi-GPU sorting algorithm and evaluate them on three modern platforms. We observe speedups over state-of-the-art parallel CPU radix sort of up to 14x for P2P sort and 9x for HET sort. On systems with fast P2P interconnects, P2P sort outperforms HET sort up to 1.65x. Finally, we show that overlapping GPU copy/compute operations does not mitigate the transfer bottleneck when sorting large out-of-core data.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 已成为排序等数据库操作的主流加速器。大多数 GPU 排序算法都是单 GPU 方法。它们既没有充分利用计算能力，也没有利用现代多 GPU 平台的高带宽 P2P 互连。最新的基于 NVLink 2.0 和 NVLink 3.0 的 NVSwitch 互连有望提供无与伦比的多 GPU 加速。到目前为止，多 GPU 排序仅在具有 PCIe 3.0 的系统上进行了评估。在本文中，我们分析了采用 PCIe 3.0/4.0、NVLink 2.0/3.0 和 NVSwitch 的系统上多个 GPU 之间的串行、并行和双向数据传输速率。我们使用基于 NVLink 3.0 的 NVSwitch over PCIe 3.0 测得并行 P2P 吞吐量提高了 35 倍。为了研究当今硬件上的 GPU 加速排序，我们实现了基于 P2P 的仅 GPU（P2P 排序）和异构（HET 排序）多 GPU 排序算法，并在三个现代平台上对其进行了评估。我们观察到，与最先进的并行 CPU 基数相比，P2P 排序的加速速度高达 14 倍，HET 排序的加速速度高达 9 倍。在具有快速 P2P 互连的系统上，P2P 排序的性能比 HET 排序高出 1.65 倍。最后，我们表明，在对大型核外数据进行排序时，重叠的 GPU 复制/计算操作并不能缓解传输瓶颈。

items.title: Efficient Massively Parallel Join Optimization for Large Queries.
items.abstract:
Modern data analytical workloads often need to run queries over a large number of tables. An optimal query plan for such queries is crucial for being able to run these queries within acceptable time bounds. However, with queries involving many tables, finding the optimal join order becomes a bottleneck in query optimization. Due to the exponential nature of join order optimization, optimizers resort to heuristic solutions after a threshold number of tables. Our objective is two fold: (a) reduce the optimization time for generating optimal plans; and (b) improve the quality of the heuristic solution.

In this paper, we propose a new massively parallel algorithm, MPDP, that can efficiently prune the large search space (via a novel plan enumeration technique) while leveraging the massive parallelism offered by modern hardware (Eg: GPUs). When evaluated on real-world benchmark queries with PostgreSQL, MPDP is at least an order of magnitude faster compared to state-of-the-art techniques for large analytical queries. As a result, we are able to increase the heuristic-fall-back limit from 12 relations to 25 relations with same time budget in PostgreSQL. Also, to handle queries with even larger number of tables, we augment MPDP to a well-known heuristic, IDP2 (iterative DP version 2) and a novel heuristic, UnionDP. By systematically exploring a much larger search space, these heuristics provides query plans that are up to 7 times cheaper as compared to the state-of-the-art techniques while being faster to compute.
items.abstract_zh:
现代数据分析工作负载通常需要对大量表运行查询。此类查询的最佳查询计划对于能够在可接受的时间范围内运行这些查询至关重要。然而，对于涉及多个表的查询，寻找最佳连接顺序成为查询优化的瓶颈。由于连接顺序优化的指数性质，优化器在达到阈值数量的表后采用启发式解决方案。我们的目标有两个：(a) 减少生成最佳计划的优化时间； (b) 提高​​启发式解决方案的质量。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新的大规模并行算法 MPDP，它可以有效地修剪大型搜索空间（通过新颖的计划枚举技术），同时利用现代硬件（例如：GPU）提供的大规模并行性。当使用 PostgreSQL 对现实世界的基准查询进行评估时，与大型分析查询的最先进技术相比，MPDP 至少快一个数量级。因此，我们能够在 PostgreSQL 中以相同的时间预算将启发式回退限制从 12 个关系增加到 25 个关系。此外，为了处理更多表的查询，我们将 MPDP 增强为众所周知的启发式 IDP2（迭代 DP 版本 2）和新颖的启发式 UnionDP。通过系统地探索更大的搜索空间，这些启发式方法提供的查询计划比最先进的技术便宜多达 7 倍，同时计算速度更快。

items.title: CFDB: Machine Learning Model Analysis via Databases of CounterFactuals.
items.abstract:
Data Scientists often design and train complex Machine Learning models that evolve over time due to re-training on new data, a revised architecture, or both. To assist Data Scientists in this process, many methods for analyzing models have been recently developed. A prominent approach for model analysis is based on the notion of Counterfactuals. A counterfactual (CF) intuitively explains the label assigned by the model to a particular instance by identifying perturbations to the instance that lead to a different predicted label. A large body of recent literature has demonstrated the usefulness of CFs for deriving insights on the model at large. The analyzed CFs come in various flavors and are applied to instances chosen based on various criteria, in the context of different analysis goals.

In this work we propose to demonstrate CFDB (Counterfactuals Database), a unified framework for querying Counterfactuals. CFDB allows to consolidate common approaches in CF-based analysis and to provide multiple levels of abstractions in a relational framework. We will demonstrate CFDB in the context of the Lending Club Loan Data, showing its usefulness by formulating and executing multiple analyses over evolving classifiers for Loan Approval.
items.abstract_zh:
数据科学家经常设计和训练复杂的机器学习模型，这些模型会由于对新数据、修改后的架构或两者的重新训练而随着时间的推移而演变。为了帮助数据科学家完成这一过程，最近开发了许多分析模型的方法。模型分析的一个重要方法是基于反事实的概念。反事实 (CF) 通过识别导致不同预测标签的实例扰动，直观地解释模型分配给特定实例的标签。最近的大量文献证明了 CF 在获得对整个模型的见解方面的有用性。分析的 CF 有多种风格，并适用于在不同分析目标的背景下基于不同标准选择的实例。

在这项工作中，我们建议演示 CFDB（反事实数据库），这是一个用于查询反事实的统一框架。 CFDB 允许整合基于 CF 的分析中的常用方法，并在关系框架中提供多个抽象级别。我们将在 Lending Club 贷款数据的背景下演示 CFDB，通过对不断变化的贷款审批分类器制定和执行多重分析来展示其有用性。

items.title: HET-GMP: A Graph-based System Approach to Scaling Large Embedding Model Training.
items.abstract: Embedding models have been recognized as an effective learning paradigm for high-dimensional data. However, a major embedding model training obstacle is that updating and retrieving the shared large-scale embedding parameters usually dominates the distributed training cycle, leading to significant scalability issues. This paper presents HET-GMP, a distributed system on training embedding models. Uniquely, HET-GMP takes advantage of a graph-based approach to efficiently increase scalability. The key insight guiding our design is the "graph way of thinking". HET-GMP creates a bigraph abstraction to represent the access relationships between data samples and embedding vectors. This enables HET-GMP to embrace graph locality and skewness as new performance opportunities and to exploit graph-based replication/partitioning and bounded-asynchronous synchronization to reduce communication overhead. We evaluate the system on the embedding models for click-through rate (CTR) prediction, which presents the most significant challenge and communication bottleneck due to heavy access concurrency to a huge embedding table. The result shows that HET-GMP supports embedding model training with 1011 parameters, achieving a reduction in communication up to 87.5% and an up-to 27.5x speedup over the state-of-the-art baseline systems.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入模型已被认为是高维数据的有效学习范例。然而，嵌入模型训练的一个主要障碍是更新和检索共享的大规模嵌入参数通常主导分布式训练周期，导致严重的可扩展性问题。本文提出了 HET-GMP，一种训练嵌入模型的分布式系统。独特的是，HET-GMP 利用基于图的方法来有效提高可扩展性。指导我们设计的关键洞察是“图形思维方式”。 HET-GMP 创建一个双图抽象来表示数据样本和嵌入向量之间的访问关系。这使得 HET-GMP 能够将图局部性和偏斜性作为新的性能机会，并利用基于图的复制/分区和有界异步同步来减少通信开销。我们在用于点击率（CTR）预测的嵌入模型上评估系统，由于对巨大嵌入表的大量访问并发，这提出了最重大的挑战和通信瓶颈。结果表明，HET-GMP 支持具有 1011 个参数的嵌入模型训练，与最先进的基线系统相比，通信量减少高达 87.5%，加速高达 27.5 倍。

items.title: How Good is My HTAP System?
items.abstract: Hybrid Transactional and Analytical Processing (HTAP) systems have recently gained popularity as they combine OLAP and OLTP processing to reduce administrative and synchronization costs between dedicated systems. However, there is no precise characterization of the features that distinguish a good HTAP system from a poor one. In this paper, we seek to solve this problem from the perspectives of both performance and freshness. To simultaneously capture the performance of both transactional and analytical processing, we introduce a new concept called throughput frontier, which visualizes both transactional and analytical throughput in a single 2D graph. The throughput frontier can capture information regarding the performance of each engine, the interference between the two engines, and various system design decisions. To capture how well an HTAP system supports real-time analytics, we define a freshness metric which quantifies how recent is the snapshot of the data seen by each analytical query. We also develop a practical way to measure freshness in a real system. We design a new hybrid benchmark called HATtrick which incorporates both throughput frontier and freshness as metrics. Using the benchmark, we evaluate three representative HTAP systems under various data size and system configurations and demonstrate how the metrics reveal important system characteristics and performance information.
items.abstract_zh: 混合事务和分析处理 (HTAP) 系统最近受到欢迎，因为它们结合了 OLAP 和 OLTP 处理，以减少专用系统之间的管理和同步成本。然而，对于区分好的 HTAP 系统和差的 HTAP 系统的特征，并没有精确的描述。在本文中，我们试图从性能和新鲜度两个角度来解决这个问题。为了同时捕获事务和分析处理的性能，我们引入了一个称为吞吐量前沿的新概念，它在单个二维图中可视化事务和分析吞吐量。吞吐量边界可以捕获有关每个引擎的性能、两个引擎之间的干扰以及各种系统设计决策的信息。为了了解 HTAP 系统对实时分析的支持程度，我们定义了一个新鲜度指标，该指标量化每个分析查询所看到的数据快照的最新程度。我们还开发了一种实用的方法来测量真实系统中的新鲜度。我们设计了一个名为 HATtrick 的新混合基准，它将吞吐量前沿和新鲜度作为指标。使用该基准，我们评估了不同数据大小和系统配置下的三个代表性 HTAP 系统，并演示了这些指标如何揭示重要的系统特征和性能信息。

items.title: Rethinking Stateful Stream Processing with RDMA.
items.abstract: Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) hardware has bridged the gap between network and main memory speed and thus invalidated the common assumption that network is often the bottleneck in distributed data processing systems. However, high-speed networks do not provide "plug-and-play" performance (e.g., using IP-over- InfiniBand) and require a careful co-design of system and application logic. As a result, system designers need to rethink the architecture of their data management systems to benefit from RDMA acceleration. In this paper, we focus on the acceleration of stream processing engines, which is challenged by real-time constraints and state consistency guarantees. To this end, we propose Slash, a novel stream processing engine that uses high-speed networks and RDMA to efficiently execute distributed streaming computations. Slash embraces a processing model suited for RDMA acceleration and scales out by omitting the expensive data re-partitioning demands of scale-out SPEs. While scale-out SPEs rely on data re-partitioning to execute a query over many nodes, Slash uses RDMA to share mutable state among nodes. Overall, Slash achieves a throughput improvement up to two orders of magnitude over existing systems deployed on an InfiniBand network. Furthermore, it is up to a factor of 22 faster than a self-developed solution that relies on RDMA-based data re-partitioning to scale out query processing.
items.abstract_zh: 远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 硬件弥补了网络和主内存速度之间的差距，从而推翻了网络通常是分布式数据处理系统瓶颈的普遍假设。然而，高速网络不提供“即插即用”性能（例如，使用IP-over-InfiniBand）并且需要仔细地共同设计系统和应用程序逻辑。因此，系统设计人员需要重新考虑其数据管理系统的架构，以便从 RDMA 加速中受益。在本文中，我们重点关注流处理引擎的加速，该加速受到实时约束和状态一致性保证的挑战。为此，我们提出了 Slash，一种新颖的流处理引擎，它使用高速网络和 RDMA 来有效地执行分布式流计算。 Slash 采用适合 RDMA 加速的处理模型，并通过省略横向扩展 SPE 昂贵的数据重新分区需求来横向扩展。横向扩展 SPE 依赖数据重新分区来在多个节点上执行查询，而 Slash 使用 RDMA 在节点之间共享可变状态。总体而言，与 InfiniBand 网络上部署的现有系统相比，Slash 的吞吐量提高了两个数量级。此外，它比依赖基于 RDMA 的数据重新分区来扩展查询处理的自主开发解决方案快达 22 倍。

items.title: Nautilus: An Optimized System for Deep Transfer Learning over Evolving Training Datasets.
items.abstract: Deep learning (DL) has revolutionized unstructured data analytics. But in most cases, DL needs massive labeled datasets and large compute clusters, which hinders its adoption. These limitations can be overcome using a popular paradigm called deep transfer learning (DTL). With DTL, one adapts a pre-trained DL model instead of training a model from scratch. Thus, DTL reduces the massive training data and compute requirements to train a model. During adaptation, a common practice is to freeze most pre-trained model parts and adapt only the remaining. Since no single adaptation scheme is universally the best, one often evaluates several schemes, which is also called model selection. We also observed that data labeling for DTL is seldom a one-off process. One often updates their labeled data intermittently by adding new labeled data and performs model selection to evaluate the accuracy of the trained models. Today, one executes this workload by performing computations for the entire pre-trained model and repeats it for every model selection cycle. This approach results in redundant computations in frozen model parts and causes usability and system inefficiency issues. In this work, we reimagine DTL model selection in the presence of frozen layers as an instance of multi-query optimization and propose two optimizations that reduce redundant computations and training overheads. We implement our optimizations into a data system called Nautilus. Experiments with end-to-end workloads on benchmark datasets show that Nautilus reduces DTL model selection runtimes by up to 5X compared to the current practice.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 彻底改变了非结构化数据分析。但在大多数情况下，深度学习需要大量标记数据集和大型计算集群，这阻碍了它的采用。这些限制可以使用称为深度迁移学习 (DTL) 的流行范例来克服。通过 DTL，我们可以调整预先训练的深度学习模型，而不是从头开始训练模型。因此，DTL 减少了训练模型所需的大量训练数据和计算需求。在适应过程中，常见的做法是冻结大多数预训练的模型部分并仅适应剩余的部分。由于没有一种适应方案是普遍最好的，因此人们经常评估多种方案，这也称为模型选择。我们还观察到 DTL 的数据标记很少是一次性过程。人们经常通过添加新的标记数据来间歇性地更新其标记数据，并执行模型选择来评估训练模型的准确性。如今，人们通过对整个预训练模型执行计算来执行此工作负载，并在每个模型选择周期中重复该计算。这种方法会导致冻结模型部件中的冗余计算，并导致可用性和系统效率低下的问题。在这项工作中，我们重新设想了存在冻结层的 DTL 模型选择作为多查询优化的实例，并提出了两种减少冗余计算和训练开销的优化。我们将优化实施到名为 Nautilus 的数据系统中。在基准数据集上进行的端到端工作负载实验表明，与当前实践相比，Nautilus 将 DTL 模型选择运行时间减少了多达 5 倍。

items.title: Multi-Tenant Cloud Data Services: State-of-the-Art, Challenges and Opportunities.
items.abstract: Enterprises are moving their business-critical workloads to public clouds at an accelerating pace. Multi-tenancy is a crucial tenet for cloud data service providers allowing them to provide services in cost-effective manner by sharing of resources among tenants of the service. In this tutorial we review architectures of today's cloud data services and identify trends and challenges that arise in multi-tenant cloud data services. We discuss techniques that have been developed for enabling elasticity, providing SLAs, ensuring performance isolation, and reducing cost. We conclude with open research problems in cloud data services.
items.abstract_zh: 企业正在加速将其关键业务工作负载转移到公共云。多租户是云数据服务提供商的一个重要原则，允许他们通过在服务租户之间共享资源来以经济高效的方式提供服务。在本教程中，我们回顾当今云数据服务的架构，并确定多租户云数据服务中出现的趋势和挑战。我们讨论为实现弹性、提供 SLA、确保性能隔离和降低成本而开发的技术。我们以云数据服务中的开放研究问题作为结束语。

items.title: Responsible Data Integration: Next-generation Challenges.
items.abstract: Data integration has been extensively studied by the data management community and is a core task in the data pre-processing step of ML pipelines. When the integrated data is used for analysis and model training, responsible data science requires addressing concerns about data quality and bias. We present a tutorial on data integration and responsibility, highlighting the existing efforts in responsible data integration along with research opportunities and challenges. In this tutorial, we encourage the community to audit data integration tasks with responsibility measures and develop integration techniques that optimize the requirements of responsible data science. We focus on three critical aspects: (1) the requirements to be considered for evaluating and auditing data integration tasks for quality and bias; (2) the data integration tasks that elicit attention to data responsibility measures and methods to satisfy these requirements; and, (3) techniques, tasks, and open problems in data integration that help achieve data responsibility.
items.abstract_zh: 数据集成已被数据管理社区广泛研究，是机器学习管道数据预处理步骤的核心任务。当集成数据用于分析和模型训练时，负责任的数据科学需要解决对数据质量和偏差的担忧。我们提供了有关数据集成和责任的教程，重点介绍了负责任的数据集成方面的现有工作以及研究机遇和挑战。在本教程中，我们鼓励社区通过责任措施审核数据集成任务，并开发优化负责任数据科学要求的集成技术。我们关注三个关键方面：（1）评估和审核数据集成任务的质量和偏差时需要考虑的要求； (2) 引起对满足这些要求的数据责任措施和方法的关注的数据集成任务； (3) 数据集成中有助于实现数据责任的技术、任务和未决问题。

items.title: Cooperative Route Planning Framework for Multiple Distributed Assets in Maritime Applications.
items.abstract: This work formalizes the Route Planning Problem (RPP), wherein a set of distributed assets (e.g., ships, submarines, unmanned systems) simultaneously plan routes to optimize a team goal (e.g., find the location of an unknown threat or object in minimum time and/or fuel consumption) while ensuring that the planned routes satisfy certain constraints (e.g., avoiding collisions and obstacles). This problem becomes overwhelmingly complex for multiple distributed assets as the search space grows exponentially to design such plans. The RPP is formalized as a Team Discrete Markov Decision Process (TDMDP) and we propose a Multi-agent Multi-objective Reinforcement Learning (MaMoRL) framework for solving it. We investigate challenges in deploying the solution in real-world settings and study approximation opportunities. We experimentally demonstrate MaMoRL's effectiveness on multiple real-world and synthetic grids, as well as for transfer learning. MaMoRL is deployed for use by the Naval Research Laboratory - Marine Meteorology Division (NRL-MMD), Monterey, CA.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作形式化了路线规划问题（RPP），其中一组分布式资产（例如，船舶、潜艇、无人系统）同时规划路线以优化团队目标（例如，在最短的时间和/或燃料消耗内找到未知威胁或物体的位置），同时确保规划的路线满足某些约束（例如，避免碰撞和障碍物）。对于多个分布式资产来说，这个问题变得极其复杂，因为设计此类计划的搜索空间呈指数级增长。 RPP 被形式化为团队离散马尔可夫决策过程 (TDMDP)，我们提出了一个多智能体多目标强化学习 (MaMoRL) 框架来解决它。我们研究在现实环境中部署解决方案的挑战并研究近似机会。我们通过实验证明了 MaMoRL 在多个现实世界和合成网格以及迁移学习上的有效性。 MaMoRL 部署供位于加利福尼亚州蒙特雷的海军研究实验室 - 海洋气象部门 (NRL-MMD) 使用。

items.title: Givens QR Decomposition over Relational Databases.
items.abstract:
This paper introduces Figaro, an algorithm for computing the upper-triangular matrix in the QR decomposition of the matrix defined by the natural join over a relational database. The QR decomposition lies at the core of many linear algebra techniques and their machine learning applications, including: the matrix inverse; the least squares; the singular value decomposition; eigenvalue problems; and the principal component analysis.

Figaro's main novelty is that it pushes the QR decomposition past the join. This leads to several desirable properties. For acyclic joins, it takes time linear in the database size and independent of the join size. Its execution is equivalent to the application of a sequence of Givens rotations proportional to the join size. Its number of rounding errors relative to the classical QR decomposition algorithms is on par with the input size relative to the join size.

In experiments with real-world and synthetic databases, Figaro outperforms both in runtime performance and accuracy the LAPACK libraries openblas and Intel MKL by a factor proportional to the gap between the join output and input sizes.
items.abstract_zh:
本文介绍 Figaro，一种用于在关系数据库上的自然连接定义的矩阵 QR 分解中计算上三角矩阵的算法。 QR 分解是许多线性代数技术及其机器学习应用的核心，包括： 矩阵逆；最小二乘法；奇异值分解；特征值问题；以及主成分分析。

Figaro 的主要新颖之处在于它将 QR 分解推过了连接。这导致了一些理想的特性。对于非循环连接，所需时间与数据库大小成线性关系，并且与连接大小无关。它的执行相当于应用一系列与连接大小成比例的吉文斯旋转。其相对于经典 QR 分解算法的舍入误差数量与相对于连接大小的输入大小相当。

在使用真实数据库和合成数据库进行的实验中，Figaro 在运行时性能和准确性方面均优于 LAPACK 库 openblas 和 Intel MKL，其性能与连接输出和输入大小之间的差距成正比。

items.title: Workload-Adaptive Filtering in Storage Engines.
items.abstract: Log-Structured Merge-Tree (LSM-tree) based storage engines power numerous applications from social media to machine learning, networks, and Blockchain. Today, storage engine performance deteriorates as data increases especially for skewed workloads due in a large part to inefficient filters. LSM-tree based storage engines rely on the effectiveness of filters to prune unneeded disk accesses. We present an adaptive filter that remembers frequent false positives to turn them into true negatives for future queries. The filter is tailored for integration in state-of-the-art storage engines, and we compare it against traditional workload agnostic filters. We show that our adaptive filter can provide up to 2x end-to-end throughput improvement.
items.abstract_zh: 基于日志结构合并树 (LSM-tree) 的存储引擎为从社交媒体到机器学习、网络和区块链的众多应用程序提供支持。如今，存储引擎的性能随着数据的增加而恶化，尤其是对于倾斜的工作负载，这在很大程度上是由于过滤器效率低下造成的。基于 LSM 树的存储引擎依靠过滤器的有效性来修剪不需要的磁盘访问。我们提出了一种自适应过滤器，它可以记住频繁的误报，并将其转变为未来查询的真阴性。该过滤器专为集成在最先进的存储引擎中而定制，我们将其与传统的工作负载无关过滤器进行了比较。我们表明，我们的自适应滤波器可以提供高达 2 倍的端到端吞吐量改进。

items.title: End-to-end Optimization of Machine Learning Prediction Queries.
items.abstract: Prediction queries are widely used across industries to perform advanced analytics and draw insights from data. They include a data processing part (e.g., for joining, filtering, cleaning, featurizing the datasets) and a machine learning (ML) part invoking one or more trained models to perform predictions.
