In this paper, we present TimeUnion, an efficient timeseries management system tailored for hybrid cloud storage services (e.g. fast cloud block stores and slow cloud object stores). First, we propose our unified data model to represent both independent timeseries and groups of timeseries, which is capable of handling diverse use cases of timeseries. Second, since the main bottleneck of the current timeseries systems is the overuse of memory, we introduce our exploration on memory-efficient data structures for timeseries to maximize the number of timeseries a compute instance can maintain. Third, to absorb the memory data chunks quickly, we present our time-partitioned LSM-tree with tailored architecture, compaction mechanism, out-of-order data handling, and dynamic level size adjustment for timeseries data. We prototype TimeUnion with C++ from scratch and evaluate it on AWS EC2 with AWS EBS (cloud block store) and AWS S3 (cloud object store). Compared to the storage engine of Cortex, TimeUnion can handle at least 5x more timeseries, and achieve at least 24.8% higher insertion throughput and 49.8% lower query latency. We have released the open-source code of TimeUnion for public access.
items.abstract_zh:
在过去十年中，随着物联网和性能监控的兴起，时间序列管理系统引起了相当大的关注。随着生产环境中数据规模的快速增长，利用云存储在云上部署时间序列管理系统是一种自然趋势，因为它具有高可用性、可靠性和可扩展性。然而，最先进的设计并不是针对云环境量身定制的。由于资源使用不平衡，单个计算节点可以处理的时间序列数量有限。

在本文中，我们介绍了 TimeUnion，这是一种专为混合云存储服务（例如快速云块存储和慢速云对象存储）量身定制的高效时间序列管理系统。首先，我们提出统一的数据模型来表示独立的时间序列和时间序列组，它能够处理时间序列的不同用例。其次，由于当前时间序列系统的主要瓶颈是内存的过度使用，因此我们介绍了对时间序列的内存高效数据结构的探索，以最大化计算实例可以维护的时间序列数量。第三，为了快速吸收内存数据块，我们提出了时间分区的 LSM 树，具有定制的架构、压缩机制、乱序数据处理和时间序列数据的动态级别大小调整。我们从头开始使用 C++ 对 TimeUnion 进行原型设计，并在 AWS EC2 上使用 AWS EBS（云块存储）和 AWS S3（云对象存储）对其进行评估。与 Cortex 的存储引擎相比，TimeUnion 可以处理至少 5 倍的时间序列，并实现至少高 24.8% 的插入吞吐量和低 49.8% 的查询延迟。我们已经发布了TimeUnion的开源代码供公众访问。

items.title: TxtAlign: Efficient Near-Duplicate Text Alignment Search via Bottom-k Sketches for Plagiarism Detection.
items.abstract: In this paper, we study the near-duplicate text alignment search problem, which, given a collection of source (data) documents and a suspicious (query) document, finds all the near-duplicate passage pairs between the suspicious document and every source document. It finds applications in plagiarism detection. Specifically, the first two steps in plagiarism detection are source retrieval and text alignment. Source retrieval finds candidate source documents in a corpus that share content with the suspicious document while text alignment finds all the similar passage pairs between the suspicious document and every candidate source document. This problem is computation-intensive, especially for long documents. This is because there are O(n2m2) passage pairs between a single source document with n words and a suspicious document with m words, not to mention the large number of source documents in a corpus. Due to the high computation cost, existing solutions primarily rely on heuristic rules, such as the "seeding-extension-filtering" pipeline, and involve many hard-to-tune hyper-parameters. To address these issues, a recent work ALLIGN leverages the min-wise hash sketch for the text alignment problem. However, ALLIGN only works for two documents and leaves the source retrieval problem unattended. In this paper, we propose to leverage the bottom-k sketch (a.k.a. conditional random sampling) to estimate the similarity of two passages. We observe that many nearby passages in a document would share the same bottom-k sketch. Thus we propose to group all the passages in a document by their sketches. We prove that all the O(n2) passages can be partitioned into O(nk) groups in a document with n words and develop an algorithm to generate these groups in O(nlogn+nk) time. Then, to address the source retrieval problem, we only need to find groups of passages with "similar" bottom-k sketches. Every passage pair in two groups with "similar" sketches are near-duplicates. Experimental results on real-world datasets show that our techniques are highly efficient.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了近似重复的文本对齐搜索问题，该问题给定源（数据）文档和可疑（查询）文档的集合，找到可疑文档和每个源文档之间的所有近似重复的段落对。它在抄袭检测中得到应用。具体来说，抄袭检测的​​前两个步骤是源检索和文本对齐。源检索在语料库中查找与可疑文档共享内容的候选源文档，而文本对齐则查找可疑文档和每个候选源文档之间的所有相似段落对。这个问题是计算密集型的，特别是对于长文档。这是因为，一个包含 n 个单词的单个源文档和一个包含 m 个单词的可疑文档之间存在 O(n2m2) 个段落对，更不用说语料库中的大量源文档了。由于计算成本较高，现有的解决方案主要依赖于启发式规则，例如“播种-扩展-过滤”管道，并且涉及许多难以调整的超参数。为了解决这些问题，最近的一项工作 ALLIGN 利用最小明智哈希草图来解决文本对齐问题。然而，ALLIGN 只适用于两个文档，并且没有解决源检索问题。在本文中，我们建议利用bottom-k sketch（又名条件随机抽样）来估计两个段落的相似度。我们观察到文档中许多附近的段落都会共享相同的bottom-k 草图。因此，我们建议按照草图对文档中的所有段落进行分组。我们证明，在包含 n 个单词的文档中，所有 O(n2) 段落都可以分为 O(nk) 个组，并开发一种算法在 O(nlogn+nk) 时间内生成这些组。然后，为了解决源检索问题，我们只需要找到具有“相似”bottom-k 草图的段落组。具有“相似”草图的两组中的每对段落都几乎是重复的。现实世界数据集的实验结果表明我们的技术非常高效。

items.title: NeutronStar: Distributed GNN Training with Hybrid Dependency Management.
items.abstract: GNN's training needs to resolve issues of vertex dependencies, i.e., each vertex representation's update depends on its neighbors. Existing distributed GNN systems adopt either a dependencies-cached approach or a dependencies-communicated approach. Having made intensive experiments and analysis, we find that a decision to choose one or the other approach for the best performance is determined by a set of factors, including graph inputs, model configurations, and an underlying computing cluster environment. If various GNN trainings are supported solely by one approach, the performance results are often suboptimal. We study related factors for each GNN training before its execution to choose the best-fit approach accordingly. We propose a hybrid dependency-handling approach that adaptively takes the merits of the two approaches at runtime. Based on the hybrid approach, we further develop a distributed GNN training system called NeutronStar, which makes high performance GNN trainings in an automatic way. NeutronStar is also empowered by effective optimizations in CPU-GPU computation and data processing. Our experimental results on 16-node Aliyun cluster demonstrate that NeutronStar achieves 1.81X-14.25X speedup over existing GNN systems including DistDGL and ROC.
items.abstract_zh: GNN 的训练需要解决顶点依赖问题，即每个顶点表示的更新依赖于其邻居。现有的分布式 GNN 系统采用依赖项缓存方法或依赖项通信方法。经过深入的实验和分析，我们发现选择一种或另一种方法以获得最佳性能的决定是由一组因素决定的，包括图形输入、模型配置和底层计算集群环境。如果仅通过一种方法支持各种 GNN 训练，则性能结果通常不是最佳的。我们在执行每个 GNN 训练之前研究相关因素，以相应地选择最适合的方法。我们提出了一种混合依赖性处理方法，该方法在运行时自适应地利用两种方法的优点。基于混合方法，我们进一步开发了一个名为 NeutronStar 的分布式 GNN 训练系统，它以自动方式进行高性能 GNN 训练。 NeutronStar 还通过 CPU-GPU 计算和数据处理的有效优化提供支持。我们在 16 节点阿里云集群上的实验结果表明，NeutronStar 比现有的 GNN 系统（包括 DistDGL 和 ROC）实现了 1.81 倍至 14.25 倍的加速。

items.title: WeTune: Automatic Discovery and Verification of Query Rewrite Rules.
items.abstract: Query rewriting transforms a relational database query into an equivalent but more efficient one, which is crucial for the performance of database-backed applications. Such rewriting relies on pre-specified rewrite rules. In existing systems, these rewrite rules are discovered through manual insights and accumulate slowly over the years. In this paper, we present WeTune, a rule generator that automatically discovers new rewrite rules. Inspired by compiler superoptimization, WeTune enumerates all valid logical query plans up to a certain size and tries to discover equivalent plans that could potentially lead to more efficient rewrites. The core challenge is to determine which set of conditions (aka constraints) allows one to prove the equivalence between a pair of query plans. We address this challenge by enumerating combinations of "interesting" constraints that relate tables and their attributes between each pair of queries. We also propose a new SMT-based verifier to verify the equivalence of a query pair under different enumerated constraints. To evaluate the usefulness of rewrite rules discovered by WeTune, we apply them on the SQL queries collected from the 20 most popular open-source web applications on GitHub. WeTune successfully optimizes 247 queries that existing databases cannot optimize, resulting in substantial performance improvements.
items.abstract_zh: 查询重写将关系数据库查询转换为等效但更高效的查询，这对于数据库支持的应用程序的性能至关重要。这种重写依赖于预先指定的重写规则。在现有系统中，这些重写规则是通过人工洞察发现的，并经过多年慢慢积累。在本文中，我们提出了 WeTune，一个可以自动发现新重写规则的规则生成器。受编译器超级优化的启发，WeTune 枚举了达到一定大小的所有有效逻辑查询计划，并尝试发现可能导致更有效重写的等效计划。核心挑战是确定哪组条件（也称为约束）允许证明一对查询计划之间的等效性。我们通过枚举“有趣”约束的组合来解决这一挑战，这些约束将每对查询之间的表及其属性关联起来。我们还提出了一种新的基于 SMT 的验证器来验证不同枚举约束下查询对的等价性。为了评估 WeTune 发现的重写规则的有用性，我们将它们应用于从 GitHub 上 20 个最流行的开源 Web 应用程序收集的 SQL 查询。 WeTune 成功优化了现有数据库无法优化的 247 个查询，从而显着提高了性能。

items.title: SparRL: Graph Sparsification via Deep Reinforcement Learning.
Serverless Data Science - Are We There Yet? A Case Study of Model Serving.
items.abstract:
Machine learning (ML) is an important part of modern data science applications. Data scientists today have to manage the end-to-end ML life cycle that includes both model training and model serving, the latter of which is essential, as it makes their works available to end-users. Systems of model serving require high performance, low cost, and ease of management. Cloud providers are already offering model serving choices, including managed services and self-rented servers. Recently, serverless computing, whose advantages include high elasticity and a fine-grained cost model, brings another option for model serving.

Our goal in this paper is to examine the viability of serverless as a mainstream model serving platform. To this end, we first conduct a comprehensive evaluation of the performance and cost of serverless against other model serving systems on Amazon Web Service and Google Cloud Platform. We find that serverless outperforms many cloud-based alternatives. Further, there are settings under which it even achieves better performance than GPU-based systems. Next, we present the design space of serverless model serving, which comprises multiple dimensions, including cloud platforms, serving runtimes, and other function-specific parameters. For each dimension, we analyze the impact of different choices and provide suggestions for data scientists to better utilize serverless model serving. Finally, we discuss challenges and opportunities in building a more practical serverless model serving system.
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习（ML）是现代数据科学应用的重要组成部分。如今的数据科学家必须管理端到端的机器学习生命周期，其中包括模型训练和模型服务，后者至关重要，因为它使他们的工作可供最终用户使用。模型服务系统需要高性能、低成本和易于管理。云提供商已经提供模型服务选择，包括托管服务和自租服务器。近年来，无服务器计算以其高弹性和细粒度成本模型的优势，为模型服务带来了另一种选择。

我们本文的目标是检验无服务器作为主流模型服务平台的可行性。为此，我们首先针对 Amazon Web Service 和 Google Cloud Platform 上的其他模型服务系统对 Serverless 的性能和成本进行了全面评估。我们发现无服务器的性能优于许多基于云的替代方案。此外，在某些设置下，它甚至可以实现比基于 GPU 的系统更好的性能。接下来，我们提出无服务器模型服务的设计空间，它包含多个维度，包括云平台、服务运行时和其他特定于功能的参数。对于每个维度，我们分析不同选择的影响，并为数据科学家更好地利用无服务器模型服务提供建议。最后，我们讨论了构建更实用的无服务器模型服务系统的挑战和机遇。

items.title: Optimizing Parallel Recursive Datalog Evaluation on Multicore Machines.
items.abstract: Over the past years, there has been a resurgence of interest in Datalog due to its superior ability of expressing applications that require recursive computations. However, in addition to expressive power, supporting analytical tasks with ever-increasing volume of data requires high performance and scalability. In this paper, we present DCDatalog, an in-memory Datalog engine specifically designed for modern shared-memory multicore architectures. Our key contribution is a novel system architecture that supports a wide scope of Datalog applications with a light-weight coordination scheme during parallel evaluation. To this end, we propose a dynamic scheduling strategy that can generate the parallel execution plan on-the-fly while reducing concurrent accesses to the shared memory. Experimental results on several large datasets show that our system significantly outperforms existing parallel Datalog engines and also scales well with increasing amount of data.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们对 Datalog 的兴趣重新燃起，因为它具有表达需要递归计算的应用程序的卓越能力。然而，除了表达能力之外，支持不断增加的数据量的分析任务还需要高性能和可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍了 DCDatalog，这是一种专门为现代共享内存多核架构设计的内存数据记录引擎。我们的主要贡献是一种新颖的系统架构，它在并行评估期间通过轻量级协调方案支持广泛的数据记录应用程序。为此，我们提出了一种动态调度策略，可以动态生成并行执行计划，同时减少对共享内存的并发访问。在几个大型数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的系统显着优于现有的并行数据记录引擎，并且随着数据量的增加也可以很好地扩展。

items.title: Hindering Influence Diffusion of Community.
items.abstract: Considering the rapid spread of incidents like rumours or epidemics, it is important to hinder their influence diffusion. However, none of the existing works can well control the influence diffusion of a community. Based on a novel metric named interaction frequency that can measure the influence diffusion of a community, we aim to remove b nodes from a given community such that the interaction frequency of the remaining nodes is minimized. We also design a polynomial-time algorithm for the problem. The experiments show our algorithm can efficiently hinder the influence diffusion.
items.abstract_zh: 考虑到谣言或流行病等事件的迅速传播，阻碍其影响力扩散很重要。然而，现有的工作都无法很好地控制社区的影响力扩散。基于一种名为交互频率的新指标，可以衡量社区的影响力扩散，我们的目标是从给定社区中删除 b 个节点，以使剩余节点的交互频率最小化。我们还为该问题设计了多项式时间算法。实验表明我们的算法可以有效地阻碍影响力扩散。

items.title: LOCAT: Low-Overhead Online Configuration Auto-Tuning of Spark SQL Applications.
items.abstract:
Spark SQL has been widely deployed in industry but it is challenging to tune its performance. Recent studies try to employ machine learning (ML) to solve this problem, but suffer from two drawbacks. First, it takes a long time (high overhead) to collect training samples. Second, the optimal configuration for one input data size of the same application might not be optimal for others.

To address these issues, we propose a novel Bayesian Optimization (BO) based approach named LOCAT to automatically tune the configurations of Spark SQL applications online. LOCAT innovates three techniques. The first technique, named QCSA, eliminates the configuration-insensitive queries by Query Configuration Sensitivity Analysis (QCSA) when collecting training samples. The second technique, dubbed DAGP, is a Datasize-Aware Gaussian Process (DAGP) which models the performance of an application as a distribution of functions of configuration parameters as well as input data size. The third technique, called IICP, Identifies Important Configuration Parameters (IICP) with respect to performance and only tunes the important ones. As such, LOCAT can tune the configurations of a Spark SQL application with low overhead and adapt to different input data sizes

We employ Spark SQL applications from benchmark suites TPC-DS, TPC-H, and HiBench running on two significantly different clusters, a four-node ARM cluster and an eight-node x86 cluster, to evaluate LOCAT. The experimental results on the ARM cluster show that LOCAT accelerates the optimization procedures of the state-of-the-art approaches by at least 4.1× and up to 9.7×; moreover, LOCAT improves the application performance by at least 1.9× and up to 2.4×. On the x86 cluster, LOCAT shows similar results to those on the ARM cluster.
items.abstract_zh:
Spark SQL已在工业界得到广泛部署，但其性能调优具有挑战性。最近的研究尝试利用机器学习（ML）来解决这个问题，但存在两个缺点。首先，收集训练样本需要很长时间（开销很高）。其次，同一应用程序的一种输入数据大小的最佳配置可能不适用于其他应用程序。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 LOCAT 的基于贝叶斯优化 (BO) 的新颖方法，用于自动在线调整 Spark SQL 应用程序的配置。 LOCAT创新了三项技术。第一种技术名为 QCSA，它在收集训练样本时通过查询配置敏感性分析 (QCSA) 消除了对配置不敏感的查询。第二种技术称为 DAGP，是数据大小感知高斯过程 (DAGP)，它将应用程序的性能建模为配置参数和输入数据大小的函数分布。第三种技术称为 IICP，可识别与性能相关的重要配置参数 (IICP)，并仅调整重要参数。因此，LOCAT 可以以较低的开销调整 Spark SQL 应用程序的配置，并适应不同的输入数据大小

我们使用基准测试套件 TPC-DS、TPC-H 和 HiBench 中的 Spark SQL 应用程序在两个截然不同的集群（一个四节点 ARM 集群和一个八节点 x86 集群）上运行来评估 LOCAT。 ARM 集群上的实验结果表明，LOCAT 将最先进方法的优化过程加速至少 4.1 倍，最高可达 9.7 倍；此外，LOCAT 将应用程序性能提高至少 1.9 倍，最高可达 2.4 倍。在 x86 集群上，LOCAT 显示的结果与 ARM 集群上的结果相似。

items.title: EVA: A Symbolic Approach to Accelerating Exploratory Video Analytics with Materialized Views.
items.abstract:
Advances in deep learning have led to a resurgence of interest in video analytics. In an exploratory video analytics pipeline, a data scientist often starts by searching for a global trend and then iteratively refines the query until they identify the desired local trend. These queries tend to have overlapping computation and often differ in their predicates. However, these predicates are computationally expensive to evaluate since they contain user-defined functions (UDFs) that wrap around deep learning models.

In this paper, we present EVA, a video database management system (VDBMS) that automatically materializes and reuses the results of expensive UDFs to facilitate faster exploratory data analysis. It differs from the state-of-the-art (SOTA) reuse algorithms in traditional DBMSs in three ways. First, it focuses on reusing the results of UDFs as opposed to those of sub-plans. Second, it takes a symbolic approach to analyze predicates and identify the degree of overlap between queries. Third, it factors reuse into UDF evaluation cost and uses the updated cost function in critical query optimization decisions like predicate reordering and model selection. Our empirical analysis of EVA demonstrates that it accelerates exploratory video analytics workloads by 4x with a negligible storage overhead (1.001x). We demonstrate that the reuse algorithm in EVA complements the specialized filters adopted in SOTA VDBMSs.
items.abstract_zh:
深度学习的进步让人们重新燃起了对视频分析的兴趣。在探索性视频分析管道中，数据科学家通常首先搜索全球趋势，然后迭代地细化查询，直到确定所需的本地趋势。这些查询往往具有重叠计算，并且它们的谓词通常不同。然而，这些谓词的评估计算成本很高，因为它们包含围绕深度学习模型的用户定义函数 (UDF)。

在本文中，我们提出了 EVA，一种视频数据库管理系统 (VDBMS)，它可以自动具体化和重用昂贵的 UDF 结果，以促进更快的探索性数据分析。它与传统 DBMS 中最先进的 (SOTA) 重用算法在三个方面有所不同。首先，它侧重于重用 UDF 的结果，而不是子计划的结果。其次，它采用符号方法来分析谓词并识别查询之间的重叠程度。第三，它将重用纳入 UDF 评估成本，并在谓词重新排序和模型选择等关键查询优化决策中使用更新的成本函数。我们对 EVA 的实证分析表明，它可以将探索性视频分析工作负载加速 4 倍，而存储开销可以忽略不计 (1.001 倍)。我们证明 EVA 中的重用算法补充了 SOTA VDBMS 中采用的专用过滤器。

items.title: TSUBASA: Climate Network Construction on Historical and Real-Time Data.
items.abstract: A climate network represents the global climate system by the interactions of a set of anomaly time-series. Network science has been applied to climate data to study the dynamics of a climate network. The core task to enable network dynamics analysis on climate data is the efficient computation and update of the correlation matrix for user-defined time-windows on historical and real-time data. We present TSUBASA, an algorithm for efficiently computing the exact pair-wise time-series correlation based on Pearson's correlation. By pre-computing simple and low-overhead sketches, TSUBASA can efficiently compute exact pairwise correlations on arbitrary time windows at query time. For real-time data, TSUBASA proposes a fast and incremental way of updating the correlation matrix. We provide a detailed time and space complexity analysis of TSUBASA. Our experiments show that with the same space overhead as a DFT-based approximate solution, TSUBASA has a lower sketching time and is on par with the approximate solution with respect to query time. TSUBASA is at least one order of magnitude faster than a baseline for both historical and real-time data.
items.abstract_zh: 气候网络通过一组异常时间序列的相互作用来表示全球气候系统。网络科学已应用于气候数据来研究气候网络的动态。对气候数据进行网络动态分析的核心任务是对历史和实时数据的用户定义时间窗口的相关矩阵进行有效计算和更新。我们提出了 TSUBASA，一种基于 Pearson 相关性有效计算精确的成对时间序列相关性的算法。通过预先计算简单且低开销的草图，TSUBASA 可以在查询时有效地计算任意时间窗口上的精确成对相关性。对于实时数据，TSUBASA 提出了一种快速增量更新相关矩阵的方法。我们提供了 TSUBASA 详细的时间和空间复杂度分析。我们的实验表明，在与基于 DFT 的近似解决方案相同的空间开销下，TSUBASA 的草图时间较短，并且在查询时间方面与近似解决方案相当。无论是历史数据还是实时数据，TSUBASA 都比基线快至少一个数量级。

items.title: In-Database Machine Learning with CorgiPile: Stochastic Gradient Descent without Full Data Shuffle.
items.abstract:
Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is the cornerstone of modern ML systems. Despite its computational efficiency, SGD requires random data access that is inherently inefficient when implemented in systems that rely on block-addressable secondary storage such as HDD and SSD, e.g., in-DB ML systems and TensorFlow/PyTorch over large files. To address this impedance mismatch, various data shuffling strategies have been proposed to balance the convergence rate of SGD (which favors randomness) and its I/O performance (which favors sequential access).

In this paper, we first conduct a systematic empirical study on existing data shuffling strategies, which reveals that all existing strategies have room for improvement---they suffer in terms of I/O performance or convergence rate. With this in mind, we propose a simple but novel hierarchical data shuffling strategy, CorgiPile. Compared with existing strategies, CorgiPile avoids a full data shuffle while maintaining comparable convergence rate of SGD as if a full shuffle were performed. We provide a non-trivial theoretical analysis of CorgiPile on its convergence behavior. We further integrate CorgiPile into PostgreSQL by introducing three new physical operators with optimizations. Our experimental results show that CorgiPile can achieve comparable convergence rate to the full shuffle based SGD, and 1.6X-12.8X faster than two state-of-the-art in-DB ML systems, Apache MADlib and Bismarck, on both HDD and SSD.
items.abstract_zh:
随机梯度下降（SGD）是现代机器学习系统的基石。尽管计算效率很高，但 SGD 需要随机数据访问，当在依赖于 HDD 和 SSD 等可块寻址辅助存储的系统（例如数据库内 ML 系统和大文件上的 TensorFlow/PyTorch）中实现时，这种访问本质上是低效的。为了解决这种阻抗不匹配的问题，人们提出了各种数据改组策略来平衡 SGD 的收敛速度（有利于随机性）及其 I/O 性能（有利于顺序访问）。

在本文中，我们首先对现有的数据洗牌策略进行了系统的实证研究，结果表明所有现有的策略都有改进的空间——它们在 I/O 性能或收敛速度方面受到影响。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一种简单但新颖的分层数据洗牌策略，CorgiPile。与现有策略相比，CorgiPile 避免了完全数据洗牌，同时保持了与执行完全洗牌相当的 SGD 收敛速度。我们对 CorgiPile 的收敛行为进行了重要的理论分析。我们通过引入三个经过优化的新物理运算符，进一步将 CorgiPile 集成到 PostgreSQL 中。我们的实验结果表明，CorgiPile 可以实现与基于完全洗牌的 SGD 相当的收敛速度，并且在 HDD 和 SSD 上比两个最先进的数据库内机器学习系统 Apache MADlib 和 Bismarck 快 1.6 倍至 12.8 倍。

items.title: Balsa: Learning a Query Optimizer Without Expert Demonstrations.
items.abstract: Query optimizers are a performance-critical component in every database system. Due to their complexity, optimizers take experts months to write and years to refine. In this work, we demonstrate for the first time that learning to optimize queries without learning from an expert optimizer is both possible and efficient. We present Balsa, a query optimizer built by deep reinforcement learning. Balsa first learns basic knowledge from a simple, environment-agnostic simulator, followed by safe learning in real execution. On the Join Order Benchmark, Balsa matches the performance of two expert query optimizers, both open-source and commercial, with two hours of learning, and outperforms them by up to 2.8× in workload runtime after a few more hours. Balsa thus opens the possibility of automatically learning to optimize in future compute environments where expert-designed optimizers do not exist.
items.abstract_zh: 查询优化器是每个数据库系统中性能关键的组件。由于其复杂性，优化器需要专家花费数月的时间来编写和数年的时间来完善。在这项工作中，我们首次证明了在不向专家优化器学习的情况下学习优化查询既是可能的又是高效的。我们推出 Balsa，一种通过深度强化学习构建的查询优化器。 Balsa 首先从一个简单的、与环境无关的模拟器中学习基础知识，然后在实际执行中安全学习。在连接顺序基准测试中，Balsa 经过两个小时的学习，其性能与两个专家查询优化器（开源和商业）的性能相匹配，并且在几个小时后，工作负载运行时间比它们高出 2.8 倍。因此，Balsa 开启了在不存在专家设计的优化器的未来计算环境中自动学习优化的可能性。

items.title: Demonstration of VegaPlus: Optimizing Declarative Visualization Languages.
items.abstract: While many visualization specification languages are user-friendly, they tend to have one critical drawback: they are designed for small data on the client-side and, as a result, perform poorly at scale. We propose a system that takes declarative visualization specifications as input and automatically optimizes the resulting visualization execution plans by offloading computational-intensive operations to a separate database management system (DBMS). Our demo emphasizes live programming of visualizations over big data, enabling users to write or import Vega specifications, view the optimized plans from our system, and even modify these plans and compare their performance via a dedicated performance dashboard.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然许多可视化规范语言都是用户友好的，但它们往往有一个严重的缺点：它们是为客户端的小数据而设计的，因此在大规模时表现不佳。我们提出了一种系统，该系统将声明性可视化规范作为输入，并通过将计算密集型操作卸载到单独的数据库管理系统（DBMS）来自动优化生成的可视化执行计划。我们的演示强调大数据可视化的实时编程，使用户能够编写或导入 Vega 规范，从我们的系统查看优化计划，甚至修改这些计划并通过专用性能仪表板比较其性能。

items.title: Scalable and Effective Bipartite Network Embedding.
items.abstract: Given a bipartite graph G consisting of inter-set weighted edges connecting the nodes in two disjoint sets U and V, bipartite network embedding (BNE) maps each node ui in U and vj in V to compact embedding vectors that capture the hidden topological features surrounding the nodes, to facilitate downstream tasks. Effective BNE should preserve not only the direct connections between nodes but also the multi-hop relationships formed alternately by the two types of nodes in G, which can incur prohibitive overheads, especially on massive bipartite graphs with millions of nodes and billions of edges. Existing solutions are hardly scalable to massive bipartite graphs, and often produce low-quality results. This paper proposes GEBE, a generic BNE framework achieving state-of-the-art performance on massive bipartite graphs, via four main algorithmic designs. First, we present two generic measures to capture the multi-hop similarity/proximity between homogeneous/heterogeneous nodes respectively, and the measures can be instantiated with three popular probability distributions, including Poisson, Geometric, and Uniform distributions. Second, GEBE formulates a novel and unified BNE objective to preserve the two measures of all possible node pairs. Third, GEBE includes several efficiency designs to get high-quality embeddings on massive graphs. Finally, we observe that GEBE achieves the best performance when instantiating MHS and MHP using a Poisson distribution, and thus, we further develop GEBEp based on Poisson-instantiated MHS and MHP, with non-trivial efficiency optimizations. Extensive experiments, comparing 15 competitors on 10 real datasets, demonstrate that our solutions, especially GEBEp, obtain superior result utility than all competitors for top-N recommendation and link prediction, while being up to orders of magnitude faster.
items.abstract_zh: 给定一个由连接两个不相交集合 U 和 V 中的节点的集合间加权边组成的二分图 G，二分网络嵌入 (BNE) 将 U 中的每个节点 ui 和 V 中的 vj 映射到紧凑的嵌入向量，以捕获节点周围隐藏的拓扑特征，以方便下游任务。有效的 BNE 不仅应该保留节点之间的直接连接，还应该保留 G 中两种类型的节点交替形成的多跳关系，这可能会产生过高的开销，特别是在具有数百万个节点和数十亿条边的大规模二部图上。现有的解决方案很难扩展到大规模的二部图，并且通常会产生低质量的结果。本文提出了 GEBE，一种通用的 BNE 框架，通过四种主要算法设计在大规模二分图上实现了最先进的性能。首先，我们提出了两种通用度量来分别捕获同质/异构节点之间的多跳相似性/接近度，并且这些度量可以用三种流行的概率分布来实例化，包括泊松分布、几何分布和均匀分布。其次，GEBE 制定了一个新颖且统一的 BNE 目标，以保留所有可能节点对的两个度量。第三，GEBE 包括多种效率设计，可以在海量图上获得高质量的嵌入。最后，我们观察到 GEBE 在使用泊松分布实例化 MHS 和 MHP 时实现了最佳性能，因此，我们进一步基于泊松实例化 MHS 和 MHP 开发 GEBEp，并进行了非平凡的效率优化。通过在 10 个真实数据集上比较 15 个竞争对手的大量实验表明，我们的解决方案（尤其是 GEBEp）在 Top-N 推荐和链接预测方面比所有竞争对手获得了卓越的结果效用，同时速度提高了几个数量级。

items.title: SAM: Database Generation from Query Workloads with Supervised Autoregressive Models.
items.abstract: With the prevalence of cloud databases, database users are increasingly reliant on the cloud database providers to manage their data. It becomes a challenge for cloud providers to benchmark different DBMS for a specific database instance without having access to the underlying data. One viable solution is to leverage a query workload, which contains a set of queries and the corresponding cardinalities, to generate a synthetic database with similar query performance. Existing methods for database generation with cardinality constraints, however, can only handle very small query workloads due to their high complexity and encounter challenges when handling join queries. In this work, we propose SAM, a supervised deep autoregressive model-based method for database generation from query workloads. First, SAM is able to process large-scale query workloads efficiently as its complexity is linear in the size of the query workload, the number of attributes and the attribute domain size. Second, we develop algorithms to obtain unbiased samples of base relations from the deep autoregressive model and assign join keys in a way that accurately recovers the full outer join of the target database. Comprehensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that SAM is able to efficiently generate a high-fidelity database that not only satisfies the input cardinality constraints, but also is close to the target database.
items.abstract_zh: 随着云数据库的盛行，数据库用户越来越依赖云数据库提供商来管理他们的数据。对于云提供商来说，在无法访问底层数据的情况下为特定数据库实例对不同的 DBMS 进行基准测试成为了一项挑战。一个可行的解决方案是利用包含一组查询和相应基数的查询工作负载来生成具有类似查询性能的合成数据库。然而，现有的具有基数约束的数据库生成方法由于复杂性高，只能处理非常小的查询工作负载，并且在处理连接查询时遇到挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SAM，这是一种基于监督深度自回归模型的方法，用于从查询工作负载生成数据库。首先，SAM 能够有效地处理大规模查询工作负载，因为其复杂性与查询工作负载大小、属性数量和属性域大小呈线性关系。其次，我们开发算法从深度自回归模型中获取基本关系的无偏样本，并以准确恢复目标数据库的完整外连接的方式分配连接键。对真实数据集的综合实验表明，SAM 能够高效生成高保真数据库，不仅满足输入基数约束，而且接近目标数据库。

items.title: Natto: Providing Distributed Transaction Prioritization for High-Contention Workloads.
items.abstract: This paper introduces Natto, a geo-distributed database system that supports transaction prioritization. Instead of having each shard process transactions in their arrival order, Natto leverages network measurements to estimate the transaction arrival time at each shard, and assigns a timestamp to the transaction based on its arrival time to the furthest shard. These timestamps establish a global ordering of transactions, and introduces opportunities to selectively abort pending low-priority transactions that conflict with a high-priority transaction, or even preempt transactions that are already partially prepared. Our experiments on both Microsoft Azure and a local cluster show that Natto's tail latency for high-priority transactions are significantly lower than the tail latencies of Carousel and TAPIR, which are the current state-of-the-art in geo-distributed transaction processing systems.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Natto，一个支持事务优先级的地理分布式数据库系统。 Natto 不是让每个分片按其到达顺序处理交易，而是利用网络测量来估计每个分片的交易到达时间，并根据交易到达最远分片的时间为其分配时间戳。这些时间戳建立了事务的全局排序，并引入了选择性中止与高优先级事务冲突的待处理低优先级事务的机会，甚至抢占已经部分准备好的事务。我们在 Microsoft Azure 和本地集群上的实验表明，Natto 对于高优先级事务的尾部延迟明显低于 Carousel 和 TAPIR 的尾部延迟，后者是地理分布式事务处理系统中当前最先进的技术。

items.title: HYPERSONIC: A Hybrid Parallelization Approach for Scalable Complex Event Processing.
items.abstract: The ability to promptly and efficiently detect arbitrarily complex patterns in massive real-time data streams is a crucial requirement in many modern applications. The ever-growing scale of these applications and the sophistication of the patterns involved make it imperative to employ advanced solutions that can optimize pattern detection. One of the most prominent and well-established ways to achieve the above goal is to apply complex event processing (CEP) in a parallel manner, using a multi-core machine and/or a distributed environment. However, the inherent tightly coupled nature of CEP severely limits the scalability of the parallelization methods currently available. In this paper, we introduce a novel parallelization mechanism for efficient complex event processing over data streams. This mechanism is based on a hybrid two-tier model combining multiple layers of parallelism. By employing a fine-grained load balancing model, this multi-layered approach leads to a substantial increase in event detection throughput, while at the same time reducing the latency and the memory consumption. An extensive experimental evaluation on multiple real-life datasets shows that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art CEP parallelization methods by a factor of two to three orders of magnitude.
items.abstract_zh: 快速有效地检测大量实时数据流中任意复杂模式的能力是许多现代应用程序的关键要求。这些应用程序的规模不断扩大，所涉及的模式也越来越复杂，因此必须采用能够优化模式检测的先进解决方案。实现上述目标的最突出和最完善的方法之一是使用多核机器和/或分布式环境以并行方式应用复杂事件处理（CEP）。然而，CEP 固有的紧密耦合性质严重限制了当前可用的并行化方法的可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的并行机制，用于对数据流进行高效的复杂事件处理。该机制基于结合多层并行性的混合两层模型。通过采用细粒度的负载平衡模型，这种多层方法可以显着提高事件检测吞吐量，同时减少延迟和内存消耗。对多个现实数据集的广泛实验评估表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的 CEP 并行化方法两到三个数量级。

items.title: Interactive Query Explanations Using Fine Grained Provenance.
items.abstract: Database users, enabled by business intelligence and data visualization platforms, use relational queries to better understand their data. When surprising aggregation results or unexpected rows appear, they want to know which input table rows caused them. While state-of-the-art query explanation systems advocate for re-running queries under counterfactual interventions on the input tables, running many of them interactively remains challenging. Prior work relies on incremental view maintenance (IVM) to refresh query results, incurring significant materialization overhead for query intermediates and scaling poorly when interventions result in many insertions/deletions. Inspired by recent advances in fast fine grained lineage capture we propose a compilation engine that leverages lineage metadata to interactively evaluate counterfactual interventions. By forgoing the conventional approach of representing lineage metadata as symbolic expressions and executing them, we decrease latencies by multiple orders of magnitude against IVM and lineage based approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 数据库用户在商业智能和数据可视化平台的支持下，使用关系查询来更好地理解他们的数据。当出现令人惊讶的聚合结果或意外的行时，他们想知道哪些输入表行导致了它们。虽然最先进的查询解释系统主张在输入表的反事实干预下重新运行查询，但以交互方式运行其中许多查询仍然具有挑战性。之前的工作依赖增量视图维护 (IVM) 来刷新查询结果，这会导致查询中间体产生大量物化开销，并且当干预导致大量插入/删除时，扩展性很差。受到快速细粒度谱系捕获最新进展的启发，我们提出了一个编译引擎，它利用谱系元数据以交互方式评估反事实干预。通过放弃将谱系元数据表示为符号表达式并执行它们的传统方法，与基于 IVM 和谱系的方法相比，我们将延迟减少了多个数量级。

items.title: An Approach for Unlabeled Tasks Prioritization.
items.abstract: Managing a task backlog is a vital and challenging activity, particularly in a large firm with thousands of developers and a massive backlog. It is beneficial to software managers to have some tools at their disposal to prioritize activities from the current backlog so that only important tasks could be accessible for tracking. This study presents a novel approach to the prioritization of software development tasks with the use of a neural network developed in the presence of unlabeled data
items.abstract_zh: 管理任务待办事项是一项至关重要且具有挑战性的活动，特别是在拥有数千名开发人员和大量待办事项的大公司中。对于软件经理来说，拥有一些工具可以对当前待办事项中的活动进行优先排序，以便只有重要的任务可以进行跟踪，这是有益的。这项研究提出了一种新颖的方法，通过使用在存在未标记数据的情况下开发的神经网络来确定软件开发任务的优先级

items.title: Efficient Algorithms for Maximal k-Biplex Enumeration.
items.abstract: Mining maximal subgraphs with cohesive structures from a bipartite graph has been widely studied. One important cohesive structure on bipartite graphs is k-biplex, where each vertex on one side disconnects at most k vertices on the other side. In this paper, we study the maximal k-biplex enumeration problem which enumerates all maximal k-biplexes. Existing methods suffer from efficiency and/or scalability issues and have the time of waiting for the next output exponential w.r.t. the size of the input bipartite graph (i.e., an exponential delay). In this paper, we adopt a reverse search framework called bTraversal, which corresponds to a depth-first search (DFS) procedure on an implicit solution graph on top of all maximal k-biplexes. We then develop a series of techniques for improving and implementing this framework including (1) carefully selecting an initial solution to start DFS, (2) pruning the vast majority of links from the solution graph of bTraversal, and (3) implementing abstract procedures of the framework. The resulting algorithm is called iTraversal, which has its underlying solution graph significantly sparser than (around 0.1% of) that of bTraversal. Besides, iTraversal provides a guarantee of polynomial delay. Our experimental results on real and synthetic graphs, where the largest one contains one billion edges, show that our algorithm is up to four orders of magnitude faster than existing algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 从二部图中挖掘具有内聚结构的最大子图已被广泛研究。二部图上一个重要的内聚结构是 k-biplex，其中一侧的每个顶点最多与另一侧的 k 个顶点断开连接。在本文中，我们研究了枚举所有最大 k-biplex 的最大 k-biplex 枚举问题。现有方法存在效率和/或可扩展性问题，并且需要等待下一个输出指数 w.r.t 的时间。输入二分图的大小（即指数延迟）。在本文中，我们采用称为 bTraversal 的反向搜索框架，它对应于所有最大 k-biplexes 之上的隐式解图上的深度优先搜索（DFS）过程。然后，我们开发了一系列技术来改进和实现该框架，包括（1）仔细选择启动 DFS 的初始解决方案，（2）从 bTraversal 的解决方案图中修剪绝大多数链接，以及（3）实现框架的抽象过程。由此产生的算法称为 iTraversal，其底层解图比 bTraversal 的稀疏（约 0.1%）。此外，iTraversal 提供了多项式延迟的保证。我们对真实图和合成图的实验结果（其中最大的图包含十亿条边）表明，我们的算法比现有算法快四个数量级。

items.title: PLAYPEN: Plug-and-Play Visual Graph Query Interfaces for Top-down and Bottom-Up Search on Large Networks.
items.abstract: Visual graph query interfaces (VQI) facilitate non-programmers to query graph data effortlessly. The construction of these interfaces for large networks is typically not data-driven. That is, they do not exploit the underlying networks to automatically generate the contents of various panels of a VQI. Such data-driven construction has several benefits such as facilitating efficient top-down and bottom-up query formulation and portability of an interface across different application domains and sources. In this demonstration, we present a novel plug-and-play visual subgraph query interface construction engine called PLAYPEN that can be plugged on any large network G with a plug specification b to automatically generate the VQI for G that satisfies b by populating various components of the interface.
items.abstract_zh: 可视化图查询接口（VQI）方便非程序员轻松查询图数据。大型网络的这些接口的构建通常不是数据驱动的。也就是说，它们不会利用底层网络自动生成 VQI 各个面板的内容。这种数据驱动的构造有几个好处，例如促进高效的自上而下和自下而上的查询制定以及跨不同应用程序域和源的接口的可移植性。在本次演示中，我们提出了一种新颖的即插即用可视化子图查询接口构建引擎，称为 PLAYPEN，它可以插入任何具有插头规范 b 的大型网络 G 上，通过填充接口的各个组件来自动生成满足 b 的 G 的 VQI。

items.title: Faster and Better Solution to Embed Lp Metrics by Tree Metrics.
items.abstract: Hierarchically Separated Tree (HST) is the most popular solution to embed a metric space into a tree metric. By using HSTs, many optimization problems, which are hard on defined metrics, become easier to get good approximation bounds with respect to the effectiveness, e.g., task assignment, trip planning, and facility location planning. Existing work focuses on constructing HSTs for arbitrary metric spaces, which makes a general-purpose algorithm take at least O(n2)-time to get tight distortion guarantees O(log(n)). Here, distortion is a prevalent measurement of HSTs' effectiveness and usability. However, we observe that (1) in many applications that HSTs are applied, only Lp metrics are used (e.g., Euclidean space), (2) the state-of-the-art solution is still time-consuming to construct HSTs for large-scale data, and (3) distortions of existing algorithms are only satisfactory for high-dimensional data. Thus, in this paper, we are motivated to study the Embedding Lp metrics through Tree metrics (ELT) problem. We aim to design a faster algorithm than O(n2) time to construct HSTs with not only O(log(n)) distortion guarantees but also good and robust empirical results. Specifically, we first present a divide-and-conquer based general framework and prove that it has a distortion guarantee of O(log(n)). To achieve a better time complexity than O(n2), we next design two optimization techniques: reducing to nearest neighbor search (by indexing) and sampling. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that our algorithm DCsam outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms by a large margin in terms of both distortion and running time.
items.abstract_zh: 分层分离树 (HST) 是将度量空间嵌入到树度量中的最流行的解决方案。通过使用 HST，许多难以定义指标的优化问题变得更容易获得关于有效性的良好近似边界，例如任务分配、行程规划和设施位置规划。现有的工作重点是为任意度量空间构造 HST，这使得通用算法至少需要 O(n2) 时间才能获得严格的失真保证 O(log(n))。在这里，失真是 HST 有效性和可用性的普遍衡量标准。然而，我们观察到（1）在许多应用 HST 的应用中，仅使用 Lp 度量（例如欧几里德空间），（2）最先进的解决方案为大规模数据构建 HST 仍然非常耗时，（3）现有算法的失真仅适用于高维数据。因此，在本文中，我们有动力通过树度量（ELT）问题来研究嵌入 Lp 度量。我们的目标是设计一种比 O(n2) 时间更快的算法来构造 HST，不仅具有 O(log(n)) 失真保证，而且具有良好且稳健的经验结果。具体来说，我们首先提出一个基于分而治之的通用框架，并证明它具有 O(log(n)) 的失真保证。为了实现比 O(n2) 更好的时间复杂度，我们接下来设计两种优化技术：减少最近邻搜索（通过索引）和采样。最后，大量的实验表明，我们的算法 DCsam 在失真和运行时间方面都大大优于最先进的算法。

items.title: T-LevelIndex: Towards Efficient Query Processing in Continuous Preference Space.
items.abstract: Top-k related queries in continuous preference space (e.g., k-shortlist preference query kSPR, uncertain top-k query UTK, output-size specified utility-based query ORU) have numerous applications but are expensive to process. Existing algorithms process each query via specialized optimizations, which are difficult to generalize. In this work, we propose a novel and general index structure T-LevelIndex, which can be used to process various queries in continuous preference space efficiently. We devise efficient approaches to build the T-LevelIndex by fully exploiting the properties of continuous preference space. We conduct extensive experimental studies on both real- and synthetic- benchmarks. The results show that (i) our proposed index building approaches have low costs in terms of both space and time, and (ii) T-LevelIndex significantly outperforms specialized solutions for processing a spectrum of queries in continuous preference space, and the speedup can be two to three orders of magnitude.
items.abstract_zh: 连续偏好空间中的 Top-k 相关查询（例如，k-shortlist 偏好查询 kSPR、不确定的 top-k 查询 UTK、输出大小指定的基于实用程序的查询 ORU）有许多应用程序，但处理起来很昂贵。现有算法通过专门的优化来处理每个查询，这很难概括。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的索引结构 T-LevelIndex，它可用于有效地处理连续偏好空间中的各种查询。我们通过充分利用连续偏好空间的属性，设计了有效的方法来构建 T-LevelIndex。我们对真实基准和综合基准进行了广泛的实验研究。结果表明，（i）我们提出的索引构建方法在空间和时间方面都具有较低的成本，并且（ii）T-LevelIndex 显着优于在连续偏好空间中处理一系列查询的专用解决方案，并且加速可以达到两到三个数量级。

items.title: ESDB: Processing Extremely Skewed Workloads in Real-time.
items.abstract: With the rapid growth of cloud computing, efficient management of multi-tenant databases has become a vital challenge for cloud service providers. It is particularly important for Alibaba, which hosts a distributed multi-tenant database supporting one of the world's largest e-commerce platforms. It serves tens of millions of sellers as tenants, and supports transactions from hundreds of millions of buyers. The inherent imbalance of shopping preferences from the buyers essentially generates a drastically skewed workload on the database, which could create unpredictable hotspots and consequently large throughput decline and latency increase. In this paper, we present the architecture and implementation of ESDB (ElasticSearch Database), a cloud-native document-oriented database which has been running on Alibaba Cloud for 5 years as the main transaction database behind Alibaba's e-commerce platform. ESDB provides strong full-text search and retrieval capability, and proposes dynamic secondary hashing as the solution for processing extremely skewed workloads. We evaluate ESDB with both simulated workloads and real-world workloads, and demonstrate that ESDB significantly enhances write throughput and reduces the completion time of writes without sacrificing query throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 随着云计算的快速发展，多租户数据库的高效管理已成为云服务提供商面临的重大挑战。这对于阿里巴巴来说尤其重要，因为阿里巴巴拥有一个支持全球最大电子商务平台之一的分布式多租户数据库。它服务于数千万卖家作为租户，并支持数亿买家的交易。买家购物偏好固有的不平衡本质上会在数据库上产生严重偏差的工作负载，这可能会产生不可预测的热点，从而导致吞吐量大幅下降和延迟增加。在本文中，我们介绍了 ESDB（ElasticSearch 数据库）的架构和实现，这是一个云原生的面向文档的数据库，已在阿里云上运行了 5 年，作为阿里巴巴电子商务平台背后的主要交易数据库。 ESDB提供强大的全文搜索和检索能力，并提出动态二次哈希作为处理极度倾斜工作负载的解决方案。我们使用模拟工作负载和实际工作负载来评估 ESDB，并证明 ESDB 在不牺牲查询吞吐量的情况下显着提高了写入吞吐量并减少了写入的完成时间。

items.title: LearnedSQLGen: Constraint-aware SQL Generation using Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Many database optimization problems, e.g., slow SQL diagnosis, database testing, optimizer tuning, require a large volume of SQL queries. Due to privacy issues, it is hard to obtain real SQL queries, and thus SQL generation is a very important task in database optimization. Existing SQL generation methods either randomly generate SQL queries or rely on human-crafted SQL templates to generate SQL queries, but they cannot meet various user specific requirements, e.g., slow SQL queries, SQL queries with large result sizes. To address this problem, this paper studies the problem of constraint-aware SQL generation, which, given a constraint (e.g., cardinality within [1k,2k]), generates SQL queries satisfying the constraint. This problem is rather challenging, because it is rather hard to capture the relationship from query constraint (e.g., cardinality and cost) to SQL queries and thus it is hard to guide a generation method to explore the SQL generation direction towards meeting the constraint. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) based framework LearnedSQLGen, for generating queries satisfying the constraint. LearnedSQLGen adopts an exploration-exploitation strategy that exploits the generation direction following the query constraint, which is learned from query execution feedback. We judiciously design the reward function in RL to guide the generation process accurately. We integrate a finite-state machine to generate valid SQL queries. Experimental results on three benchmarks showed that LearnedSQLGen significantly outperformed the baselines in terms of both accuracy (30% better) and efficiency (10-35 times).
items.abstract_zh: 许多数据库优化问题，例如慢速SQL诊断、数据库测试、优化器调优，都需要大量的SQL查询。由于隐私问题，很难获得真实的SQL查询，因此SQL生成是数据库优化中非常重要的任务。现有的SQL生成方法要么随机生成SQL查询，要么依靠人为设计的SQL模板来生成SQL查询，但它们无法满足各种用户特定的需求，例如慢速SQL查询、结果大小较大的SQL查询。为了解决这个问题，本文研究了约束感知 SQL 生成问题，在给定约束（例如，[1k,2k] 内的基数）的情况下，生成满足约束的 SQL 查询。这个问题相当具有挑战性，因为很难捕获查询约束（例如基数和成本）与 SQL 查询的关系，因此很难指导生成方法来探索满足约束的 SQL 生成方向。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架 LearnedSQLGen，用于生成满足约束的查询。 LearnedSQLGen 采用探索-利用策略，利用查询约束后的生成方向，这是从查询执行反馈中学习到的。我们明智地设计了强化学习中的奖励函数，以准确地指导生成过程。我们集成有限状态机来生成有效的 SQL 查询。三个基准测试的实验结果表明，LearnedSQLGen 在准确性（提高 30%）和效率（10-35 倍）方面均显着优于基准。

items.title: Approximate Range Thresholding.
items.abstract:
In this paper, we study the (approximate) Range Thresholding (RT) problem over streams. Each stream element is a d-dimensional point and with a positive integer weight. An RT query q specifies a d-dimensional axis-parallel rectangular range R(q) and a positive integer threshold τ(q). Once the query q is registered in the system, define s(q) as the total weight of the elements that satisfy: (i) they arrive after q's registration, and (ii) they fall in the range R(q). Given a real number 0 < ε < 1, the task of the system is to capture an arbitrary moment during the period between the first moment when s(q) ≥ (1 - ε)⋅ τ(q) and the first moment when s(q) ≥ τ(q). The challenge is to support a large number of RT queries simultaneously while achieving sub-quadratic overall running time and near-linear space consumption all the time.

We propose a new algorithm called FastRTS, which can reduce the exponent in the poly-logarithmic factor of the state-of-the-art QGT algorithm from d+1 to d, yet slightly increasing the łog term itself. Besides, we propose two extremely effective optimization techniques which significantly improve the practical performance of FastRTS. Experimental results show that FastRTS outperforms the competitors by up to three orders of magnitude in both running time and peak memory usage.
items.abstract_zh:
在本文中，我们研究了流上的（近似）范围阈值（RT）问题。每个流元素是一个 d 维点并具有正整数权重。 RT查询q指定d维轴平行矩形范围R(q)和正整数阈值τ(q)。一旦查询 q 在系统中注册，将 s(q) 定义为满足以下条件的元素的总权重：(i) 它们在 q 注册后到达，并且 (ii) 它们落在范围 R(q) 内。给定一个实数 0 < ε < 1，系统的任务是捕获 s(q) ≥ (1 - ε)⋅ τ(q) 的第一个时刻和 s(q) ≥ τ(q) 的第一个时刻之间的任意时刻。面临的挑战是同时支持大量 RT 查询，同时始终实现次二次整体运行时间和近线性空间消耗。

我们提出了一种名为 FastRTS 的新算法，它可以将最先进的 QGT 算法的多对数因子中的指数从 d+1 减少到 d，同时略微增加 łog 项本身。此外，我们提出了两种极其有效的优化技术，显着提高了 FastRTS 的实际性能。实验结果表明，FastRTS 在运行时间和峰值内存使用量方面均优于竞争对手多达三个数量级。

items.title: Skeena: Efficient and Consistent Cross-Engine Transactions.
items.abstract:
Database systems are becoming increasingly multi-engine. In particular, a main-memory database engine may coexist with a traditional storage-centric engine in a system to support various applications. It is desirable to allow applications to access data in both engines using cross-engine transactions. But existing systems are either only designed for single-engine accesses, or impose many restrictions by limiting cross-engine transactions to certain isolation levels and table operations. The result is inadequate cross-engine support in terms of correctness, performance and programmability.

This paper describes Skeena, a holistic approach to cross-engine transactions. We propose a lightweight snapshot tracking structure and an atomic commit protocol to efficiently ensure correctness and support various isolation levels. Evaluation results show that Seena maintains high performance for single-engine transactions and enables cross-engine transactions which can improve throughput by up to 30x by judiciously placing tables in different engines.
items.abstract_zh:
数据库系统正变得越来越多引擎。具体地，主存储器数据库引擎可以与传统的以存储为中心的引擎共存于系统中以支持各种应用。希望允许应用程序使用跨引擎事务访问两个引擎中的数据。但现有系统要么只针对单引擎访问而设计，要么通过将跨引擎事务限制在某些隔离级别和表操作来施加许多限制。其结果是在正确性、性能和可编程性方面跨引擎支持不足。

本文介绍了 Skeena，一种跨引擎交易的整体方法。我们提出了轻量级快照跟踪结构和原子提交协议，以有效确保正确性并支持各种隔离级别。评估结果表明，Seena 保持了单引擎事务的高性能，并支持跨引擎事务，通过明智地将表放置在不同引擎中，可以将吞吐量提高高达 30 倍。

items.title: Deploying a Steered Query Optimizer in Production at Microsoft.
items.abstract: Modern analytical workloads are highly heterogeneous and massively complex, making generic out of the box query optimizers untenable for many customers and scenarios. As a result, it is important to specialize these optimizers to instances of the workloads. In this paper, we continue a recent line of work in steering a query optimizer towards better plans for a given workload, and make major strides in pushing previous research ideas to production deployment. Along the way we solve several operational challenges including, making steering actions more manageable, keeping the costs of steering within budget, and avoiding unexpected performance regressions in production. Our resulting system, QO-Advisor, essentially externalizes the query planner to a massive offline pipeline for better exploration and specialization. We discuss various aspects of our design and show detailed results over production SCOPE workloads at Microsoft, where the system is currently enabled by default.
items.abstract_zh: 现代分析工作负载高度异构且极其复杂，使得通用的开箱即用查询优化器对于许多客户和场景来说难以维持。因此，将这些优化器专门针对工作负载实例非常重要。在本文中，我们继续最近的一系列工作，引导查询优化器针对给定工作负载制定更好的计划，并在将先前的研究想法推向生产部署方面取得重大进展。在此过程中，我们解决了多项运营挑战，包括使转向操作更易于管理、将转向成本控制在预算范围内，以及避免生产中出现意外的性能下降。我们最终的系统 QO-Advisor 本质上将查询规划器外部化到一个巨大的离线管道中，以实现更好的探索和专业化。我们讨论了设计的各个方面，并展示了 Microsoft 生产 SCOPE 工作负载的详细结果，该系统目前默认启用。

items.title: Towards Dynamic and Safe Configuration Tuning for Cloud Databases.
items.abstract: Configuration knobs of database systems are essential to achieve high throughput and low latency. Recently, automatic tuning systems using machine learning methods (ML) have shown to find better configurations compared to experienced database administrators (DBAs). However, there are still gaps to apply the existing systems in production environments, especially in the cloud. First, they conduct tuning for a given workload within a limited time window and ignore the dynamicity of workloads and data. Second, they rely on a copied instance and do not consider the availability of the database when sampling configurations, making the tuning expensive, delayed, and unsafe. To fill these gaps, we propose OnlineTune, which tunes the online databases safely in changing cloud environments. To accommodate the dynamicity, OnlineTune embeds the environmental factors as context feature and adopts contextual Bayesian Optimization with context space partition to optimize the database adaptively and scalably. To pursue safety during tuning, we leverage the black-box and the white-box knowledge to evaluate the safety of configurations and propose a safe exploration strategy via subspace adaptation. We conduct evaluations on dynamic workloads from benchmarks and real-world workloads. Compared with the state-of-the-art methods, OnlineTune achieves 14.4% ~165.3% improvement on cumulative performance while reducing 91.0%~99.5% unsafe configuration recommendations.
items.abstract_zh: 数据库系统的配置旋钮对于实现高吞吐量和低延迟至关重要。最近，与经验丰富的数据库管理员 (DBA) 相比，使用机器学习方法 (ML) 的自动调优系统已显示出更好的配置。然而，现有系统在生产环境尤其是云端的应用还存在差距。首先，他们在有限的时间窗口内对给定的工作负载进行调优，而忽略工作负载和数据的动态性。其次，它们依赖于复制的实例，在对配置进行采样时不考虑数据库的可用性，从而导致调优成本高昂、延迟且不安全。为了填补这些空白，我们提出了 OnlineTune，它可以在不断变化的云环境中安全地调整在线数据库。为了适应动态性，OnlineTune将环境因素嵌入为上下文特征，并采用上下文贝叶斯优化和上下文空间分区来自适应和可扩展地优化数据库。为了追求调整过程中的安全性，我们利用黑盒和白盒知识来评估配置的安全性，并通过子空间适应提出安全探索策略。我们根据基准和实际工作负载对动态工作负载进行评估。与最先进的方法相比，OnlineTune 的累积性能提高了 14.4% ~165.3%，同时减少了 91.0%~99.5% 的不安全配置建议。

items.title: Parallel Query Processing: To Separate Communication from Computation.
items.abstract: In this paper, we study parallel query processing with a focus on reducing the communication cost, which is the dominating factor in parallel query processing. The communication cost becomes large if the intermediate results between operators are large in intra-operator parallelism. In the existing approaches, it optimizes an SQL query by arranging relational algebra operators to reduce the total cost, where, for each operator, it involves (i) distribution of data partitioned to computing nodes by communication, and (ii)computation on computing nodes locally. The communication and computation are dealt with inside an operator and are not separable. In other words, it is difficult to avoid large intermediate results and hence reduce the communication cost. To reduce communication cost, we separate communication from computation using several new operators proposed in this paper. One is a pair operator () to pair the partitions of a relation R with the partitions of a relation S, where a partition is specified by a hash function. With the pair operator defined, we can explicitly deal with communication to deliver pairs of partitions to computing nodes. Together with, we can also explicitly treat the local computation on a computing node as op for any RA (relational algebra) operator op. We give a merge operator (U), to collect all partial results from computing nodes as they are. In short, with, op, and U, we are able to explicitly specify communication and computation for RA operators. Furthermore, we propose new techniques, namely, partitioning push-down and computation push-up to separate communication from computation for RA expressions. We prove that we can push-down/up for a wide range of relational expressions. We have developed a distributed system named Secco (Separate Communication from Computation) by revamping SparkSQL on Spark, and confirmed the efficiency of our approach in our performance studies using real datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究并行查询处理，重点是降低通信成本，这是并行查询处理的主导因素。如果算子之间的中间结果在算子内并行性中很大，则通信成本会变大。在现有的方法中，它通过安排关系代数运算符来优化SQL查询以降低总成本，其中对于每个运算符，它涉及（i）通过通信将分区的数据分发到计算节点，以及（ii）本地计算节点上的计算。通信和计算在算子内部处理，不可分离。换句话说，很难避免大的中间结果，从而降低沟通成本。为了降低通信成本，我们使用本文提出的几个新运算符将通信与计算分开。一种是配对运算符 ()，用于将关系 R 的分区与关系 S 的分区配对，其中分区由哈希函数指定。定义对运算符后，我们可以显式处理通信以将分区对传递到计算节点。同时，我们还可以显式地将计算节点上的本地计算视为任何 RA（关系代数）运算符 op 的 op。我们给出一个合并运算符（U），以按原样收集来自计算节点的所有部分结果。简而言之，使用、op 和 U，我们能够显式指定 RA 算子的通信和计算。此外，我们提出了新技术，即分区下推和计算上推，以将 RA 表达式的通信与计算分开。我们证明我们可以对各种关系表达式进行下推/上推。我们通过改进 Spark 上的 SparkSQL 开发了一个名为 Secco（通信与计算分离）的分布式系统，并在使用真实数据集的性能研究中证实了我们方法的效率。

items.title: MinMax Sampling: A Near-optimal Global Summary for Aggregation in the Wide Area.
items.abstract: Nowadays, wide-area data analyses are pervasive with emerging geo-distributed systems. These analyses often need to do the global aggregation in the wide area. Since scarce and variable WAN bandwidth may degrade the aggregation performance, it is highly desired to design a communication scheme for global aggregation in WAN. Unfortunately, no existing algorithm can meet the three design requirements of communication schemes: fast computation, adaptive transmission, and accurate aggregation. In this paper, we propose MinMax Sampling, a fast, adaptive, and accurate communication scheme for global aggregation in WAN. We first focus on the accuracy and design a scheme, namely MinMaxopt, to achieve optimal accuracy. However, MinMaxopt does not meet the other two requirements: fast computation and adaptive transmission. Based on MinMaxopt, we propose MinMaxadp, which trades little accuracy for the other two requirements. We evaluate MinMaxadp with three applications: federated learning, distributed state aggregation, and hierarchical aggregation. Our experimental results show that MinMaxadp is superior to existing algorithms (8.44× better accuracy on average) in all three applications. The source codes of MinMax Sampling are available at Github [1].
items.abstract_zh: 如今，广域数据分析在新兴的地理分布式系统中普遍存在。这些分析往往需要在广域内进行全局聚合。由于广域网带宽的稀缺和变化可能会降低聚合性能，因此非常需要设计一种用于广域网中全局聚合的通信方案。不幸的是，现有的算法都无法满足通信方案的三个设计要求：快速计算、自适应传输和精确聚合。在本文中，我们提出了 MinMax Sampling，这是一种用于 WAN 中全局聚合的快速、自适应且准确的通信方案。我们首先关注精度并设计一个方案，即MinMaxopt，以达到最佳精度。然而，MinMaxopt 不满足另外两个要求：快速计算和自适应传输。基于MinMaxopt，我们提出了MinMaxadp，它以很少的精度换取了其他两个要求。我们使用三种应用来评估 MinMaxadp：联邦学习、分布式状态聚合和分层聚合。我们的实验结果表明，MinMaxadp 在所有三种应用中均优于现有算法（平均精度提高 8.44 倍）。 MinMax Sampling 的源代码可在 Github [1] 上找到。

items.title: Leva: Boosting Machine Learning Performance with Relational Embedding Data Augmentation.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present Leva, an end-to-end system that boosts the performance of machine learning tasks over relational data. Leva builds a relational embedding by representing relational data as a graph and then using embedding methods to represent the graph as vectors. The embedding represents information from the entire database, including useful information for the downstream machine learning task. At the same time, some information in the graph will be erroneous, for example, corresponding to incorrect inclusion dependencies. However, we show that the supervision signal from the downstream task filters out information that is not useful. The result is a boost in ML performance. This result means that it is possible for analysts to avoid the time-consuming effort of collecting features across multiple relations-which requires solving a data discovery and integration problem-and instead rely on these techniques to train better-performing models. We demonstrate Leva's performance on different classification and regression datasets and compare it with multiple other baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Leva，这是一种端到端系统，可以提高机器学习任务相对于关系数据的性能。 Leva 通过将关系数据表示为图，然后使用嵌入方法将图表示为向量来构建关系嵌入。嵌入表示来自整个数据库的信息，包括对下游机器学习任务有用的信息。同时，图中的一些信息将会是错误的，例如对应于不正确的包含依赖关系。然而，我们表明来自下游任务的监督信号过滤掉了无用的信息。结果是机器学习性能的提升。这一结果意味着分析师可以避免跨多个关系收集特征的耗时工作（这需要解决数据发现和集成问题），而是依赖这些技术来训练性能更好的模型。我们展示了 Leva 在不同分类和回归数据集上的性能，并将其与多个其他基线进行比较。

items.title: Lightweight and Accurate Cardinality Estimation by Neural Network Gaussian Process.
items.abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has achieved great success in many real applications. Despite its success, there are some main problems when deploying advanced DL models in database systems, such as hyper-parameters tuning, the risk of overfitting, and lack of prediction uncertainty. In this paper, we study a lightweight and accurate cardinality estimation for SQL queries, which is also uncertainty-aware. By lightweight, we mean that we can train a DL model in a few seconds. With uncertainty ensured,it becomes possible to update the estimator to improve its prediction in areas with high uncertainty.The approach we explore is different from the direction of deploying sophisticated DL models as cardinality estimators in database systems. We employ Bayesian deep learning (BDL), which serves as a bridge between Bayesian inference and deep learning. The prediction distribution by BDL provides principled uncertainty calibration for the prediction. In addition, when the network width of a BDL model goes to infinity, the model performs equivalent to Gaussian Process (GP). This special class of BDL, known as Neural Network Gaussian Process (NNGP), inherits the advantages of Bayesian approach while keeping universal approximation of neural networks, and can utilize a much larger model space to model distribution-free data as a nonparametric model. We show our NNGP estimator achieves high accuracy, is built fast, and is robust to query workload shift, in our extensive performance studies by comparing with existing learned estimators. We also confirm the effectiveness of NNGP by integrating it into PostgreSQL.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）在许多实际应用中取得了巨大成功。尽管取得了成功，但在数据库系统中部署高级深度学习模型时仍存在一些主要问题，例如超参数调整、过度拟合的风险以及缺乏预测不确定性。在本文中，我们研究了一种轻量级且准确的 SQL 查询基数估计，它也是不确定性感知的。所谓轻量级，是指我们可以在几秒钟内训练一个深度学习模型。在确保不确定性的情况下，可以更新估计器以改进其在高不确定性区域的预测。我们探索的方法不同于在数据库系统中部署复杂的深度学习模型作为基数估计器的方向。我们采用贝叶斯深度学习（BDL），它充当贝叶斯推理和深度学习之间的桥梁。 BDL 的预测分布为预测提供了原则上的不确定性校准。此外，当 BDL 模型的网络宽度趋于无穷大时，该模型的性能相当于高斯过程（GP）。这种特殊的BDL，称为神经网络高斯过程（NNGP），继承了贝叶斯方法的优点，同时保持神经网络的通用逼近，并且可以利用更大的模型空间将无分布数据建模为非参数模型。在我们广泛的性能研究中，通过与现有的学习估计器进行比较，我们展示了我们的 NNGP 估计器实现了高精度、构建速度快，并且对于查询工作负载转移具有鲁棒性。我们还通过将 NNGP 集成到 PostgreSQL 中来确认其有效性。

items.title: Generating Interpretable Data-Based Explanations for Fairness Debugging using Gopher.
items.abstract: Machine learning (ML) models, while increasingly being used to make life-altering decisions, are known to reinforce systemic bias and discrimination. Consequently, practitioners and model developers need tools to facilitate debugging for bias in ML models. We introduce Gopher, a system that generates compact, interpretable and causal explanations for ML model bias. Gopher identifies the top-k coherent subsets of the training data that are root causes for model bias by quantifying the extent to which removing or updating a subset can resolve the bias. We describe the architecture of Gopher and will walk the audience through real-world use cases to highlight how Gopher generates explanations that enable data scientists to understand how subsets of the training data contribute to the bias of a machine learning (ML) model. Gopher is available as open-source software; The code and the demonstration video are available at https://gopher-sys.github.io/.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 模型虽然越来越多地被用来做出改变生活的决策，但众所周知，它会加剧系统性偏见和歧视。因此，从业者和模型开发人员需要工具来促进机器学习模型中偏差的调试。我们引入了 Gopher，这是一个为 ML 模型偏差生成紧凑、可解释和因果解释的系统。 Gopher 通过量化删除或更新子集可以解决偏差的程度来识别训练数据的前 k 个相干子集，这些子集是模型偏差的根本原因。我们描述了 Gopher 的架构，并将引导观众了解现实世界的用例，以重点介绍 Gopher 如何生成解释，使数据科学家能够了解训练数据的子集如何影响机器学习 (ML) 模型的偏差。 Gopher 可作为开源软件使用；代码和演示视频可在 https://gopher-sys.github.io/ 上获取。

items.title: Spine: Scaling up Programming-by-Negative-Example for String Filtering and Transformation.
items.abstract: Program synthesis (a.k.a. programming-by-example, PBE) has been deployed in several widely-used commercial products, such as Microsoft Excel, Power BI, and Google Spreadsheet, due to its effectiveness and user-friendliness. It takes a few user-provided positive and negative examples as input and produces a program that is consistent with all the examples, which helps end-users wrangle messy texts without writing any code. In this paper, we focus on two text wrangling tasks, string filtering and transformation. Existing PBE systems for string filtering do not scale well with negative examples. This is because they first explicitly synthesize all the consistent programs and then greedily search a good one in them. However, when there are negative examples, it could take an exponential time and space to synthesize all the exponential number of consistent programs. In contrast, we propose to synthesize all the programs consistent with the positive examples first and then lazily determine whether a program is also consistent with all the negative examples on demand in the search step. For this purpose, we develop a dynamic programming algorithm to search the optimal consistent program. Many programs are never explored during dynamic programming as they are dominated by other better consistent programs. As for string transformation, existing PBE systems do not even support negative examples. Our approach naturally extends to string transformation. Experimental results show that our methods significantly outperformed the state-of-the-art string filtering and transformation approaches and achieved better scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其有效性和用户友好性，程序综合（又名示例编程，PBE）已部署在多种广泛使用的商业产品中，例如 Microsoft Excel、Power BI 和 Google Spreadsheet。它采用一些用户提供的正面和负面示例作为输入，并生成与所有示例一致的程序，这可以帮助最终用户在不编写任何代码的情况下处理混乱的文本。在本文中，我们重点关注两个文本整理任务：字符串过滤和转换。现有的用于字符串过滤的 PBE 系统不能很好地适应负面示例。这是因为他们首先显式地综合所有一致的程序，然后贪婪地在其中搜索一个好的程序。然而，当存在反例时，可能需要指数级的时间和空间来合成所有指数级数量的一致程序。相反，我们建议首先综合所有与正例一致的程序，然后在搜索步骤中按需延迟确定程序是否也与所有负例一致。为此，我们开发了一种动态规划算法来搜索最佳一致程序。许多程序在动态编程期间从未被探索过，因为它们被其他更好的一致程序所主导。至于字符串转换，现有的PBE系统甚至不支持反例。我们的方法自然延伸到字符串转换。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于最先进的字符串过滤和转换方法，并实现了更好的可扩展性。

items.title: SIGMOD '22: International Conference on Management of Data, Philadelphia, PA, USA, June 12 - 17, 2022
items.abstract:
This year, due to the lift of travel restrictions and the improvement of the Covid-19 pandemic world-wide, SIGMOD is being held in a hybrid format, with a special emphasis on bringing back much-needed face-to-face interactions among our community.

We are excited to host SIGMOD in person again after the past two online editions. We have an excellent technical program with outstanding research, industrial and demonstration track presentations, keynotes, tutorials, panels, and the awards session. Building upon the lessons we learned in the online editions during the pandemic, SIGMOD combined asynchronous and synchronous elements. Every technical talk was pre-recorded and posted for viewing ahead of time. Questions and discussions were handled asynchronously through Slack channels. But in addition, synchronous sessions were held at the conference where presentations were viewed inperson and live-streamed, and the audience and speakers could interact.

This year, we had three categories of papers in the Research Track, (a) Data Management (b) Data Science and (c) Data-centric Applications. Data Science papers focused on data intensive components of data science pipelines, solving problems in areas of interest to the community inspired by real applications. Data-centric applications papers presented novel applications of data management systems in other neighbouring domains beyond Computer Science in order to inspire future research in our community.

In the Research Track this year, we received 514 research submissions (259 for Round 1 and 255 for Round 2), which were extensively reviewed by 191 program committee members, 26 associate editors, and several external reviewers. We accepted 151 submissions (a 29.3% acceptance rate), most of them after a revision phase that gave authors 2 months to revise and resubmit their papers in response to the reviewer comments.

This year, we expanded on the detailed reviewing instructions provided to the reviewers to promote constructive reviewing. Authors were given the opportunity to provide structured feedback directly to the reviewers, associate editors and the program chairs. Furthermore, papers that were selected for revision were given an extra page in their final camera-ready version to allow for more space to address reviewer comments and suggestions.
items.abstract_zh:
今年，由于旅行限制的取消以及全球范围内 Covid-19 疫情的好转，SIGMOD 将以混合形式举行，特别强调在我们社区之间恢复急需的面对面互动。

我们很高兴继过去两届在线版本之后再次亲自主办 SIGMOD。我们拥有出色的技术计划，包括出色的研究、工业和演示演讲、主题演讲、教程、小组讨论和颁奖典礼。基于我们在大流行期间从在线版本中学到的经验教训，SIGMOD 结合了异步和同步元素。每场技术演讲都预先录制并发布以供提前观看。问题和讨论通过 Slack 通道异步处理。但除此之外，会议还举行了同步会议，现场观看演示并进行直播，观众和演讲者可以互动。

今年，我们的研究方向有三类论文：（a）数据管理（b）数据科学和（c）以数据为中心的应用程序。数据科学论文重点关注数据科学管道的数据密集型组件，在实际应用的启发下解决社区感兴趣的领域的问题。以数据为中心的应用论文介绍了数据管理系统在计算机科学之外的其他邻近领域的新颖应用，以启发我们社区的未来研究。

在今年的研究轨道中，我们收到了 514 份研究提交（第一轮 259 份，第二轮 255 份），这些提交由 191 名程序委员会成员、26 名副编辑和几位外部审稿人进行了广泛审阅。我们接受了 151 份投稿（接受率为 29.3%），其中大多数都经过了修改阶段，作者有 2 个月的时间根据审稿人的意见修改并重新提交论文。

今年，我们扩大了向审稿人提供的详细审稿说明，以促进建设性审稿。作者有机会直接向审稿人、副编辑和项目主席提供结构化反馈。此外，被选中进行修订的论文在最终的相机版本中会获得额外的页面，以便有更多的空间来处理审稿人的意见和建议。
